== overview == the dockworkers are an enemy group in city of villains. == enemy types == === minions === ==== dockworker ==== thumb 100pxthumb 100px these dockworkers are upset about the working conditions the family are putting them through and have decided to take up arms against it. levels: 20-26 powers ==== dockworker ==== thumb 100px these dockworkers are upset about the working conditions the family are putting them through and have decided to take up arms against it. levels: 20-26 powers === lieutenants === ==== dockworker heavy ==== 100px thumb dockworker heavy these dockworkers are upset about the working conditions the family are putting them through and have decided to take up arms against it. levels: 20-26 powers === bosses === ==== dockworker foreman ==== thumb 100px these dockworkers are upset about the working conditions the family are putting them through and have decided to take up arms against it. levels: 20-26 powers == named bosses == * foreman brammel (dockworker foreman) * foreman brooks (dockworker foreman) * foreman popoff (dockworker foreman) category:enemies

== overview == the decaying eidolons are a group found in doc buzzsaw's story arcs. they are the remnants of the vahzilok eidolons, fallen into disrepair without the doctor to maintain them. == related groups == file:badge villain vahzilok.png vahzilok == enemy types == === minions === ==== rotting luminous eidolon ==== the luminous eidolons from dr. vahzilok's ruined corpse army have become akin to minor walking meltdowns. approach these with caution, as they can infect and leech from an unsuspecting hero. powers ==== rotting mire eidolon ==== right thumb 100px the mire eidolons from dr. vahzilok's rapidly decaying army have begun to leak miasma from every orifice, and this has not gone unnoticed. they are more dangerous and desperate than ever, capable of overwhelming a hero's senses. powers ==== rotting murk eidolon ==== the murk eidolons from dr. vahzilok's festering former army have taken a more aggressive approach to their impending deaths. they have weaponized their rotting blood into a toxic snare to catch unprepared heroes. powers === lieutenants === ==== decomposing luminous eidolon ==== right thumb 100px the luminous eidolons from dr. vahzilok's ruined corpse army have become akin to minor walking meltdowns. approach these with caution, as they can infect and leech from an unsuspecting hero. powers ==== decomposing mire eidolon ==== the mire eidolons from dr. vahzilok's rapidly decaying army have begun to leak miasma from every orifice, and this has not gone unnoticed. they are more dangerous and desperate than ever, capable of overwhelming a hero's senses. powers ==== decomposing murk eidolon ==== the murk eidolons from dr. vahzilok's festering former army have taken a more aggressive approach to their impending deaths. they have weaponized their decomposing blood into a toxic snare to catch unprepared heroes. powers === bosses === ==== decaying luminous eidolon ==== the luminous eidolons from dr. vahzilok's ruined corpse army have become akin to minor walking meltdowns. approach these with caution, as they can infect and leech from an unsuspecting hero. powers power 22px focus toggle: self + , , +perception the eidolon can focus his mind to evade many attacks. ==== decaying mire eidolon ==== right thumb 100px the mire eidolons from dr. vahzilok's rapidly decaying army have begun to leak miasma from every orifice, and this has not gone unnoticed. they are more dangerous and desperate than ever, capable of overwhelming a hero's senses. powers ==== decaying murk eidolon ==== the murk eidolons from dr. vahzilok's festering former army have taken a more aggressive approach to their impending deaths. they have weaponized their decaying blood into a toxic snare to catch unprepared heroes. powers power 22px dark embrace self, toggle, the eidolon taps into the energy of the netherworld to protect him from damage. dark embrace shrouds the eidolon in darkness and grants the eidolon resistance to lethal, smashing, and negative energy damage. cannot be used at the same time as murky cloud or obsidian shield. === elite bosses === ==== cortex? ==== right thumb 100px cortex has seen better days. once a former hero turned into one of dr. vahzilok's most prized creations, he appears to be falling apart rapidly. he is still a formidable foe with an array of mental powers to up-end unsuspecting supers. powers category:enemies

== overview == d.o.o.m. are an enemy group in city of heroes. these buggy creatures only spawn during the dreaded mapserver april fools special event; they do not otherwise appear outdoors or in mission content. enemies spawned during the event have extremely high experience modifiers (1000% for minions/lieutenants/bosses/elite bosses, and 2000% for the dreaded mapserver). == enemy types == === minions === ==== code gremlin ==== gremlins, much like bugs, are just as annoying but harder to catch, and sometimes compromise other things unexpectedly. a true mischief maker! powers power 22px charged armor toggle, self when you toggle on this power, you are surrounded in a charged field that makes you highly resistant to smashing, lethal, fire, cold, energy and negative energy damage. power 22px static shield toggle, self , , resist(endurance debuff, recovery debuff) when you toggle on this power, you are surrounded in a charged field that makes you highly resistant to smashing, lethal, fire, cold, energy and negative energy damage. this static shield protects you from hold, sleep, and disorient effects as well as endurance drain, recovery debuffs and enemy teleportation. static shield can also help normalize your synaptic activity, granting you good resistance to psionic damage. power 22px resistance auto, the organized nemesis soldiers are resistant to fear and confusion. ==== random bug ==== one of many common issues, the 'bug' tends to annoy you and make your life difficult, but doesn't stop you in your tracks... unless there are a lot of them. powers power 22px kinetic shield toggle, self , resist(defense debuff) your defense to smashing, lethal, cold, fire, energy, and negative energy attacks is increased. the shield also grants you good resistance to defense debuffs. power 22px entropy shield toggle, self , , resist(defense debuff) your defense to smashing, lethal, cold, fire, energy, and negative energy attacks is increased. the shield also makes you resistant to knockback, repel, disorient, hold, sleep, immobilization, defense debuffs and enemy teleportation for as long as you can keep this toggle power active. power 22px resistance auto, the organized nemesis soldiers are resistant to fear and confusion. ==== unstable script ==== this unstable script is liable to explode at a moment's notice. but if it doesn't, it will surely make the intern that wrote it seem smarter than he is! powers power 22px resistance auto, , arachnos mobile drones are resistant to lethal, smashing, energy, fire and cold damage. power 22px resistance auto, the organized nemesis soldiers are resistant to fear and confusion. === lieutenants === ==== unspecified error ==== sometimes, errors will show up, and nobody knows how it was missed for this long. powers power 22px resistance auto, , , , seers are able to predict their foes' incoming attacks granting them a minor defense buff, and are quite resistant to psychic damage. power 22px resistance auto, the organized nemesis soldiers are resistant to fear and confusion. === bosses === ==== crash to desktop ==== sometimes, code conflicts will crash you straight into a desktop. not recommended to fight in an office location. powers power 22px resistance auto, the organized nemesis soldiers are resistant to fear and confusion. ==== the mapserver? ==== the mapserver has been central to so many hero and villain defeats over time, that it's hard to believe it's escaped capture for so long! powers power 22px resistance auto, the organized nemesis soldiers are resistant to fear and confusion. === elite bosses === ==== the mapserver? ==== the mapserver has been central to so many hero and villain defeats over time, that it's hard to believe it's escaped capture for so long! powers power 22px resistance auto, the organized nemesis soldiers are resistant to fear and confusion. ==== working as intended ==== you can't be fooled that easily. how could a single monkey operate a complex freakshow suit like that? powers : power 22px resistance auto, , freakshow tanks are resistant to smashing and lethal damage, knockback and disorient. however, they are vulnerable to energy damage. it shorts them out. power 22px resistance auto, the organized nemesis soldiers are resistant to fear and confusion. === giant monsters === ==== the dreaded mapserver! ==== the mapserver has been central to so many hero and villain defeats over time, that it's hard to believe it's escaped capture for so long. it is the alpha and omega of supers world-wide... it's been there since the beginning, and will be there at the end. some say it was already at the end, and is trying to accelerate to the end to save humanity the misery. powers === other enemies === ==== blindness (lieutenant) ==== monkey see no evil. powers power 22px resistance auto, the organized nemesis soldiers are resistant to fear and confusion. ==== quiet (lieutenant) ==== monkey speak no evil. powers power 22px resistance auto, the organized nemesis soldiers are resistant to fear and confusion. ==== silence (lieutenant) ==== monkey hear no evil. powers power 22px resistance auto, the organized nemesis soldiers are resistant to fear and confusion. category:enemies

== overview == as the name implies, citizens of first ward are encountered in first ward, usually as allies. they include inhabitants of eltentown and several named characters who appear in story arcs in this zone. == enemy types == === minions === ==== bedraggled citizen ==== right thumb 100px this citizen has managed to find a way to survive in first ward despite the numerous threats to survival one may encounter in this lost part of praetoria. powers === lieutenants === ==== hardened citizen ==== this citizen has managed to find a way to survive in first ward despite the numerous threats to survival one may encounter in this lost part of praetoria. powers === bosses === ==== worldweary citizen ==== this citizen has managed to find a way to survive in first ward despite the numerous threats to survival one may encounter in this lost part of praetoria. powers === named enemies === ==== lieutenants ==== ===== anna palatine ===== right thumb 100px main article: palatine the appointed sovereign of the survivor compound in first ward, anna palatine's title has been ignored by the hetman, except for when it has suited his aims. powers power 22px damage resistance the midnight masters are naturally resistant to several types of damage. ===== blind makwa ===== right thumb 100px main article: blind makwa blind makwa was born without sight like normal men. he was gifted with the rare and beautiful ability to see spirits as others see one another every day. it was this reason that he became a well respected medicine man. his ability to converse with those who had taken the heaven's road and joined with the great spirit was sought by many in the wake of the hamidon wars. but dead men are supposed to tell no tales, and so when blind makwa began hearing terrible truths, he snuck away to the first ward where he would be safe, and no one would look for him. powers power 22px damage resistance the praetorian carnival forces are naturally resistant to several types of damage, but have a weakness to negative energy. ==== bosses ==== ===== katie douglas ===== right thumb 100px main article: katie douglas katie douglas is an ex-seer who escaped from the seer network and the authorities and made her way to first ward. she has worked tirelessly toward freeing other seers and has enjoyed limited success in the first ward. to accomplish that feat, however, she has had to lie low and choose her allies very carefully. the resistance sees her as nothing more than a weapon, politically or literally, and the loyalists would just as soon place her back into the network for another 15 years. powers power 22px resistance , , seers are able to predict their foes' incoming attacks granting them a minor defense buff, and are quite resistant to psychic damage. category:enemies category:praetorians

cybernetic implants. his power core runs incredibly hot, allowing him to channel the heat into powerful blasts of fire or as thrusters to increase the force of his kicks and punches. powers power 22px unstoppable self + , , +recovery, delayed weaken(self -end, -hp) when you activate this power, you not only become extremely resistant to most damage, but also to disorient, immobilization, hold, and sleep effects. endurance recovery is also increased. unstoppable costs little endurance to activate, but when it wears off you are left exhausted, and drained of almost all health and endurance. ==== carmine revolt ==== one of crey's new real-id protectors with the altruist division, carmine revolt is able to cover his body in a red crystal that is as hard as diamond. he can break off chunks of these crystals and hurl them at high speeds to pummel his foes. powers power 22px rock armor toggle: self + , , resist(end drain), +regeneration your skin becomes stone while this power is active. stone armor protects you from smashing and lethal attacks. they are less likely to land and affect you. stone armor also grants you resistance to defense debuffs. ==== cerulean soul ==== one of crey's new real-id protectors with the altruist division, cerulean soul houses the spirit of an ancient god of war within him, allowing him to wield his twin chinese dao with deadly skill. some question why one of crey's so-called unmasked heroes wears a mask; apparently, it magically keeps the war god from possessing him entirely. powers power 22px inner focus toggle: self + , , +perception you become more evasive to melee, ranged attacks, area effect attacks and cone shaped attacks. your focus also offers you resistance to confuse effects and allows you to perceive stealthy foes. power 22px reflexes auto: self + , scaling damage resistance you have the ability to innately dodge some melee attacks and you resist defense debuffs. dodge also grants you minor damage resistance to all damage except toxic and psionic. this damage resistance is only available as you lose health but it improves as your hp declines. this power is always on, and will permanently increase your defense versus melee attacks. ==== crimson king ==== crimson king is a member of the altruist division, a public-facing super group comprised of crey's new real id protectors, heroes recruited from outside of paragon city. he was brought in to replace the team members who mutinied against their leader. he has precise control of his toxic blood, allowing him to turn it into both deadly blasts and debilitating poison. powers ==== darkness dragon ==== darkness dragon is a member of the altruist division, a public-facing super group comprised of crey's new real id protectors, heroes recruited from outside of paragon city. if you ask her, she's connected with every other hero and villain of note in paragon, even though she's supposed to be new in town. her body appears to be composed at least partially of a fuliginous miasma that can weaken her foes and causes disturbing thoughts in those who look at her. powers ==== deadly queen ==== deadly queen is a member of the altruist division, a public-facing super group comprised of crey's new real id protectors, heroes recruited from outside of paragon city. she was brought in to replace the team members who mutinied against their leader. she is a master martial artist who can extend her ki control over her enemies to paralyze them. powers power 22px strength of will self + , , +recovery, delayed weaken(self -end) when you activate this power, you not only become extremely resistant to most damage, but also to disorient, immobilization, hold, knockback, repel and sleep effects. strength of will costs little endurance to activate and increases your recovery for its duration, but when it wears off you are left exhausted, and substantially drained of endurance. ==== duplicate shinobi ==== one of crey's new real-id protectors with the altruist division, duplicate shinobi has a natural mind for understanding esoteric ninja techniques. he is so skilled that he has been known to duplicate an enemy's technique mid-fight, a propensity that earned him his epithet. powers power 22px ninjitsu toggle: self stealth, + , +perception ninjitsu is the secret art of ninja. many ninjitsu powers emphasize acute senses that allow you to react deftly to avoid danger. others focus on the ability to hide in plain sight. still others rely on the ancient art of kuji kiri, and the pure focus of the mind to accomplish the impossible. power 22px kuji-in rin self + , , +spd, +end, heal kuji-in rin is the strength of mind and body. by focusing your power on this exercise, you gain a resistance to disorient, hold, sleep, immobilization, confusion, and fear, as well as resistance to psionic damage for a few minutes. ==== flaming blade ==== flaming blade is a member of the altruist division, a public-facing super group comprised of crey's new real id protectors, heroes recruited from outside of paragon city. despite his gruff, standoffish demeanor, he is a reliable teammate, always willing to go the extra mile to see the mission succeed. a skilled fighter with his broadsword, he is able to cloak his body in deadly flames that incinerate incoming attacks to protect him from harm. powers power 22px parry melee, light dmg(lethal), self + , you can use this power to parry incoming melee attacks. the parry itself does minor damage, but every successful hit will increase your defense against melee and lethal attacks for a short while. power 22px fire shield toggle: pbaoe, minor dot(fire), self + , while this power is active, fire shield gives you good resistance to lethal, smashing and fire damage. fire shield also provides minimal resistance to cold damage as well as protection from disorient effects. power 22px temperature protection auto: self + , , resist(slow), +regen temperature protection gives you strong resistance to fire damage, some resistance to cold damage and slow effects, and grants minor, unenhanceable regeneration as well as provide very minor knockback protection. this power is always on and costs no endurance. ==== golden wind ==== golden wind is a member of the altruist division, a public-facing super group comprised of crey's new real id protectors, heroes recruited from outside of paragon city. she was brought in to replace the team members who mutinied against their leader. she is able to generate winds capable of both bowling over enemies and soothing allies. powers ==== granite effigy ==== granite effigy is a member of the altruist division, a public-facing super group comprised of crey's new real id protectors, heroes recruited from outside of paragon city. after discovering an ancient relic on an archeological dig, she found her body transformed into a living statue. with concentration, she can temporarily revert to flesh and bone, but her stone form allows her to wade into the thick of combat to keep her foes off the rest of her team. powers power 22px rock armor toggle: self + , , , resist(end drain), +regen, +recovery your skin becomes stone while this power is active. stone armor protects you from smashing and lethal attacks. they are less likely to land and affect you. stone armor also grants you resistance to defense debuffs. cannot be active at the same time as granite armor. ==== hermit turtle ==== one of crey's new real-id protectors with the altruist division, and second in command of their tau team, hermit turtle has spent a lifetime studying the natural flow of energy through the human body. this understanding has allowed him to maintain peak human performance despite his advanced age. powers power 22px invincibility toggle: self + , + , +tohit(special) while this power is active, for each nearby foe in melee range you receive a bonus to defense against all attacks but psionics, and a bonus to your chance to hit. this power is most effective while fighting multiple opponents. the first foe you engage in melee grants the highest defense bonus, and up to 10 foes can contribute to you defense and tohit bonus. power 22px unstoppable self + , , +recovery, delayed weaken(self -end, -hp) when you activate this power, you not only become extremely resistant to most damage, but also to disorient, immobilization, hold, knockback and sleep effects. endurance recovery is also increased. unstoppable costs little endurance to activate, but when it wears off you are left exhausted, and drained of almost all health and endurance. ==== light cannon ==== light cannon is a member of the altruist division, a public-facing super group comprised of crey's new real id protectors, heroes recruited from outside of paragon city. originally a small-timer from boulder, colorado, he is eager to prove himself on the biggest hero stage in the world. he is able to produce powerful blasts of radiation from his body, allowing him to rain destruction down on foes from afar. powers power 22px alpha barrier toggle: self + you cloak yourself in a field of protective radiation that grants you a good deal of resistance to lethal, smashing and toxic damage. ==== lunar wave ==== one of crey's new real-id protectors with the altruist division, lunar wave is apparently part demon. his deadly claws grow sharper and more powerful when moonlight shines down upon him. powers power 22px integration toggle: self + , +regeneration you can integrate your mind and body, making you resistant to knockback, disorient, hold, sleep, and immobilization effects, as well as increase your regeneration rate, for as long as you can keep this toggle power active. ==== mesmeric sword ==== mesmeric sword is a member of the altruist division, a public-facing super group comprised of crey's new real id protectors, heroes recruited from outside of paragon city. binding blade is a veteran of the rikti war who awakened their mental powers after a chance encounter with a rikti mesmerist. not only can they destroy the psyches of opponents with powerful psionic blades, they are also able to read their opponents thoughts, allowing them to predict and evade attacks. powers power 22px inner focus toggle: self + , , +perception you become more evasive to melee, ranged attacks, area effect attacks and cone shaped attacks. your focus also offers you resistance to confuse effects and allows you to perceive stealthy foes. power 22px reflexes auto: self + , scaling damage resistance you have the ability to innately dodge some melee attacks and you resist defense debuffs. dodge also grants you minor damage resistance to all damage except toxic and psionic. this damage resistance is only available as you lose health but it improves as your hp declines. this power is always on, and will permanently increase your defense versus melee attacks. power 22px elude self + , +res(debuff def), +spd, +jump, +recovery, delayed weaken(self -end, -recovery) you can improve your reflexes, making yourself so quick you can elude almost any attack, be it ranged, melee, or area effect. your running speed and jumping height are also increased. when elude wears off, you are left drained of all endurance and unable to recover endurance for a while. ==== mirror man ==== mirror man is a member of the altruist division, a public-facing super group comprised of crey's new real id protectors, heroes recruited from outside of paragon city. he was brought in to replace the team members who mutinied against their leader. mirror man's entire body seems to be made of some highly reflective material. he is able to reflect enemy attacks and send blasts of energy their way. powers power 22px personal force field self + , , resist(teleport) the personal force field is almost impenetrable to all attacks, even psionics and enemy teleportation, although attacks from more powerful foes may get through more easily. personal force field will also reduce the damage of almost any attacks that do get through. power 22px dispersion bubble toggle: pbaoe, team + , + creates a large bubble which protects all allies inside. while active, the dispersion bubble gives all allies within increased defense against all attack types. the dispersion bubble also protects allies from immobilization, disorient, and hold effects. ==== moon fang ==== moon fang is a new member of the altruist division, a public-facing super group comprised of crey's new real id protectors, heroes recruited from outside of paragon city. he was recruited to take the place of team members who have been lost to the devouring earth. he possesses razor-sharp claws and a feral instinct driving him to rip his enemies to shreds while dark energy swirls about him to protect him from counter attacks. powers power 22px dark embrace toggle: self + , you tap into the energy of the netherworld to protect yourself from damage. this dark embrace shrouds you and grants resistance to lethal, smashing, negative energy and toxic damage. power 22px shadow meld self + , +regen, +recovery your mastery over the shadows allows you to become a living shadow entity for a short time, increasing your defense to all attacks. ==== sea ghost ==== one of crey's new real-id protectors with the altruist division, sea ghost was a passenger on a cruise ship that was lost at sea. she washed up on shore after nearly a decade, unable to remember much of her time missing, but with the power to control water and sea life. powers ==== shining diamond ==== shining diamond is a member of the altruist division, a public-facing super group comprised of crey's new real id protectors, heroes recruited from outside of paragon city. he was brought in to replace the team members who mutinied against their leader. his body is made of rock hard diamond, making him nearly impervious to pain and allowing his punches to land with the impact of a cannonball. powers power 22px temp invulnerability toggle: self + , when you toggle on this power, you become highly resistant to smashing and lethal damage. power 22px invulnerability auto: self + , resist(slow, end drain) invulnerability gives you incredible abilities to resist damage and other effects. its resistance to physical damage is superior, however, invulnerability offers no protection from psionic attacks. ==== siberian punk ==== one of crey's new real-id protectors with the altruist division, siberian punk was a young ice skating prodigy from the coldest reaches of russia who gave it all up to be a hero. he continues to use his agility to aid him in combat. powers power 22px ninja reflexes toggle: self + , +perception activating your ninja reflexes enables you to be more evasive to melee attacks. this will increase your defense versus melee as long as it is active. ninja reflexes also grants you resistance to defense debuffs. power 22px kuji-in rin self + , +spd, +jump, +recovery, +res(debuff def), delayed weaken(self -end, -recovery) kuji-in retsu is the mastery of space and time. focusing your power on retsu enables you to control your own time to easily defeat your foes. mastery of this power enables you to avoid almost any attack, be it ranged, melee, or area effect. your running speed, jumping height and endurance recovery are also increased. retsu also grants you high resistance to defense debuffs. when retsu wears off, you are left drained of all endurance and unable to recover endurance for a while. ==== siren singer ==== one of crey's new real-id protectors with the altruist division, and leader of their tau team, siren singer once dreamed of becoming a world reknowned metal singer. despite her band's heavy, intermittently brutal style, audiences always seemed lulled to sleep. eventually, she realized her voice was the problem and began using it to put criminals to sleep instead. powers power 22px sonic dispersion toggle: pbaoe, team + , you create a large field of sonic waves, protecting all allies inside. the sonic dispersion gives all allies within increased resistance against all damage except psionic. the sonic bubble also protects allies from immobilization, disorient, and hold effects. ==== slaughterscape ==== slaughterscape is a member of the altruist division, a public-facing super group comprised of crey's new real id protectors, heroes recruited from outside of paragon city. she was recruited to take the place of a team member who was removed by their leader. she can grow metallic shrapnel from her body, allowing her to pelt enemies from afar, tearing into them while pinning them in place. powers ==== super saying ==== one of crey's new real-id protectors with the altruist division, super saying yells a lot to get stronger in battle. note from ms. west: i really phoned it in on this one, hold off on deploying it until i come up with something better. god, the guys in the lab really need to do better at putting - hey, didn't i tell you to stop typing my musings into - powers power 22px sound barrier toggle: self +absorb, +recovery, + , creates a barrier around the caster which reduces incoming energy and smashing damage, provides protection against sleep effects and grants an absorption shield. recovery is also increased. ==== void collapse ==== one of crey's new real-id protectors with the altruist division, void collapse is able to gain a mutant's powers by devouring a small portion of their dna. aside from this being fairly unsettling, some of them can mix in... unpredictable ways, so she avoids doing so unless necessary. powers ==== voyager guardian ==== one of crey's new real-id protectors with the altruist division, when voyager guardian was in middle school, an alien that looked like a kitten granted her super powers to protect the world from threats from beyond the stars. powers power 22px light form self + , , +recovery, delayed weaken(self -end, -hp) when you activate light form, you become pure kheldian energy and are extremely resistant to most damage. you are also partially protected from some disorient, immobilization, hold, and sleep effects. endurance recovery is also increased. while in light form, you cannot shape shift into bright nova or white dwarf form. light form costs little endurance to activate, but when it wears off you are left exhausted, and drained of almost all hit points and endurance. ==== white haze ==== white haze is a member of the altruist division, a public-facing super group comprised of crey's new real id protectors, heroes recruited from outside of paragon city. they were recruited to take the place of team members who have been lost to the devouring earth. they are able to generate incredible cold that is able to freeze virtually anything, even the air itself. powers power 22px arctic fog toggle: pbaoe, team stealth, + , , resist(slow) your mastery of cold allows you to hide yourself and all nearby allies within thick arctic fog. arctic fog makes you and your allies harder to see and increases your defense to area effect, melee and ranged attacks, as well as your resistance to slow, fire, cold, and energy damage. you cannot use any other concealment type powers while using arctic fog. ==== white spider ==== one of crey's new real-id protectors with the altruist division, white spider is the reincarnation of a juvenile arachnid-like creature from another world who died in a terrible accident. she was born with four spider-like limbs on her back, which attracted arachnos to her. after enduring years of horrible experiments, including grafting cybernetic components onto her spider limbs, she was rescued by crey personnel during a daring raid. once she recovered, she decided to repay crey by joining the altruist division. note from ms. west: is the crey part too much? i think it might raise a few... are you typing that into the fbsa registration form? stop that, you id - powers power 22px hardened carapace toggle: self + , , with a little concentration you can cause your skin to become hard as stone, boosting your constitution to reject toxins and recovering from wounds more quickly. while active, this power will boost your resistance to lethal, smashing and toxic damage, grant a minor amount of regeneration, and protection from disorient and sleep effects. category:enemies

== overview == there are a number of doppelgangers or duplicates of themselves that a hero or villain may encounter in paragon city or the rogue isles. any individual encountering their doppelganger will find themselves face to face with their own mirror image. this double will look and sound the same and will possess the same powers, but will have a mind entirely their own. the doppelganger may be working toward the same end as their counterpart or may be pursuing an entirely different goal. certain doppelgangers may be clones or beings from alternate dimensions, but each considers itself to be the original and will view any other version as just another copy. the villain protean, in connection with praetoria, appears to be behind the cloned doppelgangers. he is heavily involved with the 5th column and cloning labs. furthermore, although at the end of both story arcs involving the doppelgangers they may appear to have been destroyed, a random npc dialog would seem to indicate that at least one clone from leonard's arc survived. whether this is meant to refer to the dying clone if you leave it, or another clone entirely, is a matter of speculation. npc text title=npc passerby text=i saw this weird thing walking around, it looked like , but it was burnt to a crisp! == appearance and powers == a doppelganger will spawn in the costume your character is wearing at the time it spawns, but it will not change costumes afterwards. certain clones may have color variations, but will be wearing the same costume items. all clones' powers will have the default colors. doppelgangers share your power pools, but may exhibit specific powers you have not selected, especially if they are "flawed clones". they do not appear to have access to any veteran reward powers that you may own. power sets appear to be derived from mission architect's custom critters - a melee power set lacking a range attack such as martial arts will have access to a heavy hitting ranged shuriken attack not normally seen in the power set. if you are part of a supergroup, some clones will have your supergroup's name as their enemy faction. otherwise, they will be part of the "doppelgangers" faction. == npc types == === clones === from barely more than the goo scraped from the bottom of the cloning vat, to a version so flawless it could pass for you in your own mirror, clones are the result of what some call "forbidden" science. ==== flawed clones ==== ===== clones gone horribly wrong ===== these clones use the same models as the banished pantheon husks and chambers, and are even labeled as part of the banished pantheon villain group. they can be found in test out your clones from leonard. they include such specimens as: rancid clone undeveloped clone clone gone horribly wrong destroyed clone disgusting clone putrid clone walking corpse horrific clone this...isn't exactly a clone of yourself. 20-29 ===== flawed clone ===== encountered in defeat ajax from dean macarthur. if you are a member of a supergroup, this clone will have your supergroup labeled as its villain group. while this clone actually looks like you, there is still something not quite right. perhaps with some better technology it could be improved? this clone is almost your exact replica, but it seems like something isn't quite right with it. 20-29 this clone spawns with a seemingly random set of powers. see http://web.archive.org/web/20120904174740/http://boards.cityofheroes.com/showthread.php?t=219883 this thread on the official forums for examples. ==== perfected clones ==== perfected clones not only walk like you, talk like you, but they shoot flame/blast energy/pound things with their fists like you! if you are part of one, these clones will have your supergroup name as their enemy group. ===== working clones ===== these clones are encountered in special agent jenni adair's . you can see them in a cutscene and in the final room, where they will have been defeated. ===== test clones ===== these clones have been created in your own personal cloning lab. you must face them in the from leonard, to ensure that the cloning process works correctly. although they are stated to be "perfected," they may still have a few minor variations in power selection. they include: angry clone (i will...tear...you...apart!!) serene clone (i will show you what i am made of, character.) rude clone (you're just an old relic, character! i'll show you who the real deal is!) profane clone (#*!&) self-absorbed clone (there's no way that i could look like such a wretch, you've gotten me all wrong!) shy clone (....) insane clone (hehe...ho...hoho...hahahaha!) perfected clone (you can't hope to defeat me, !) this is one of your perfected clones. 20-29 these clones have a selection of powers from your power sets. this includes powers that are too high level for you to have. ======badge====== the army of me badge is awarded upon defeating these clones when set to fighting eight test clones at once. ===== dying/recovered clone ===== this clone can be encountered while running out of your cloning facility before it blows up, and in the next mission - if you choose to save it. this clone of yours will die here in this lab unless you choose to do something! the clone that you saved seems to have some unfinished business! this clone has a selection of powers from your power sets. === alternates === ==== mirror self ==== in field agent keith nance and special agent jenni adair's arcs you will encounter a duplicate of yourself. this duplicate claims to come from another dimension. its appearance will be the same as yours in every way. you see before you a strange doppelganger of yourself! this person seems to match you in every way, shape, and form. this clone has a selection of powers from your power sets. ==== your evil mirror ==== encountered in field agent keith nance's arc, this clone is an evil version of you. it will spawn wearing your current costume, with the primary and secondary color choices switched. it is a good enough clone that it is able to fool many of your fellow heroes and a government agency into believing that it is you. it's...you! but...not you. sort of. whoever this person is, they must be the one responsible for ruining your name! this person appears to be your identical twin, however you can clearly see that they are your evil opposite! this doppelganger has a selection of powers from your power sets. === other types === ==== nemesis automaton ==== in the hero acceptance version of mission:tip - miss thystle's plea you encounter a nemesis automaton version of yourself. it is named doppelganger and its villain group will be the name of your supergroup if you have one, if you do not. this nemesis automaton has similar powers to your own and looks just like you! npc text title=doppelganger dialogue text= before combat: *klick* once we stop that meddling duo, they too will have automatons crafted after them! combat start: a fitting end for you, ! torn apart by your mechanical better! 75% health: soon all of paragon's heroes will be replaced by nemesis' automatons. 50% health: impossible, i am your superior! *klick* 25% health: upon defeat:*klick* *bzzt* defeating a player: ==== shadow simulacrum ==== summoned by powerful magic, these enemies look like you, but serve the will of their creator! category:npc allies category:enemies category:npcs

enemy_names: This enemy group was added to the game in Issue 21.
corpus: == overview == the dregs is a villain group found in the praetorian zone, first ward, from level 20 to 29. == background == == villain types == === minions === ==== raider ==== x250px right raider raiders are toughened survivalists who embody the phrase "kill or be killed". these scavengers often take to robbing, killing, and enslaving the citizens of first ward in order to sustain themselves. powers power 22px damage resistance the talons of vengeance are naturally resistant to several types of damage. === lieutenants === ==== wastelander ==== x250px right wastelander wastelanders are veteran first ward survivors. they are extremely tough after years of exposure to the elements and dangers of the area. they tend to shoot first and ask questions later. powers power 22px damage resistance the talons of vengeance are naturally resistant to several types of damage. === bosses === ==== renegade ==== x250px right renegade whether soldiers of fortune, former destroyers, or ex-military, the renegades are deadly combatants who are skilled with a large number of weapons they've acquired over the years. their superior combat ability often lands them in leadership positions amongst groups of survivors in the wilderness. powers power 22px damage resistance the talons of vengeance are naturally resistant to several types of damage. === named enemies === * dreg slavers (raider or wastelander) found in investigate the slaver den from nadia * slavemaster taggart (renegade) found in investigate the slaver den from nadia == historical == *this enemy group was added to the game in issue 21. == see also == *issue 21 *first ward category:enemies

== overview == the drudges are an enemy group that appear in night ward. they, like many myths regarding reapers and ferrymen, are tasked with shepherding the dead. they deal in wax currencies, which, to some extent has influenced their appearances. == enemy types == === minions === ==== hooded lantern ==== 50px thumb right the drudges' hooded lanterns are powered by the wax of souls which they collect and use as currency. this torch flickers and floats before you, moving at the whim of the taskmasters who control the drudges' hierarchy. powers power 22px damage resistance the drudges have a set of natural affinities that make them stronger against some forms of damage and weaker against others. ==== patrolman ==== 100px thumb right in the night ward the drudge patrolmen are the embodiment of the authority and law of the taskmaster's office. some souls try to resist their transition from one world to the next, while outsiders are always trafficking in stolen souls. it is the patrolman's job to ensure that operations in night ward move smoothly, and take care of any complications that might arise. powers power 22px damage resistance the drudges have a set of natural affinities that make them stronger against some forms of damage and weaker against others. ==== spirit guide ==== 100px thumb right this creature's grisly appearance is not unlike a hundred different descriptions of the grim reaper or the ferryman. indeed, a spirit guide's existence is devoted to the ushering of souls from one world to the next. they do so with mechanical efficiency and enthusiasm, as their reward for a job well done is a payment in wax, which keeps their spirit candle burning, if only long enough to find another soul in need of guidance to the next world. powers power 22px damage resistance the drudges have a set of natural affinities that make them stronger against some forms of damage and weaker against others. === lieutenants === ==== lamplighter ==== 100px thumb right lamplighters are tasked with keeping night ward's lamps lit and push back the dark forces that hunger for the souls of the dead. however, their spiritual flame is more than just for lighting lamps, it can also ignite one's soul. powers power 22px damage resistance the drudges have a set of natural affinities that make them stronger against some forms of damage and weaker against others. ==== watcher ==== 100px thumb right the watchers oversee squads of patrolmen and are assigned by drudge taskmasters to act as cudgels when something needs to be done quickly and efficiently. they are feared not only because of their lash, but because they can call upon the very shadows of night ward to hunt down those who obstruct the directives of the taskmaster's office. powers power 22px damage resistance the drudges have a set of natural affinities that make them stronger against some forms of damage and weaker against others. === bosses === ==== taskmaster ==== 100px thumb right taskmasters are the bureaucratic masterminds of the drudges. they have, for time immemorial, been in charge of the flow of souls from each world to the next, and they have made a great deal of profit off of their services. the taskmasters deal in wax, which is used to keep the candles of the drudges burning - but in order to meet the demands of their taskmasters the drudges must burn their candles at both ends, creating an eternal cycle of dependence. powers power 22px damage resistance the drudges have a set of natural affinities that make them stronger against some forms of damage and weaker against others. === named bosses === * taskmaster burke (taskmaster) found on the stop the talons from stealing souls mission from sir bedwyr * taskmaster carlyle (taskmaster) found on the find percy's soul mission from montague castanella == related badges == category:enemies category:praetorians

__noeditsection__ == overview == the escaped prisoners are a villain group in city of villains located exclusively in the breakout tutorial zone. __toc__ == villain types == thumb 100pxthumb 100pxthumb 100px === minions === each of these minions displayed name will be one of: * council prisoner * hellion prisoner * skull prisoner ==== brawl prisoner ==== the zigursky prison, or 'zig' as it's known on the street, houses the most dangerous criminals in paragon city. despite the zig's advanced security systems, a few hardened criminals occasionally escape. with nothing but time on their hands, these cons stop at nothing to win their freedom. powers 22px brawl melee smash when all else fails, use your own 2 fists. 22px rock ranged smash prisoners can pick up small rocks and throw them at their foes. not much damage. ==== knife prisoner ==== the zigursky prison, or 'zig' as it's known on the street, houses the most dangerous criminals in paragon city. despite the zig's advanced security systems, a few hardened criminals occasionally escape. with nothing but time on their hands, these cons stop at nothing to win their freedom. powers ==== pipe prisoner ==== the zigursky prison, or 'zig' as it's known on the street, houses the most dangerous criminals in paragon city. despite the zig's advanced security systems, a few hardened criminals occasionally escape. with nothing but time on their hands, these cons stop at nothing to win their freedom. powers ==== revolver prisoner ==== the zigursky prison, or 'zig' as it's known on the street, houses the most dangerous criminals in paragon city. despite the zig's advanced security systems, a few hardened criminals occasionally escape. with nothing but time on their hands, these cons stop at nothing to win their freedom. powers category:enemies

== overview == == background == == enemy types == === minions === ==== type 22 ==== right 125px thumb these genetically altered humans are given the cold numeric moniker type 22, suggesting that they were part of an earlier batch of experiments. genetic meddling has given them immense strength and speed, at the cost of extremely rapid cellular decay. powers power 22px resistance auto, +res(lethal, smash) +run speed this power grants the ghoul some minor resistance to lethal and smashing damage. ==== improved type 22 ==== these genetically altered humans are given the cold numeric moniker type 22, suggesting that they were part of an earlier batch of experiments. genetic meddling has given them immense strength and speed, at the cost of extremely rapid cellular decay. powers === lieutenants === ==== type 53 ==== right 125px thumb more advanced genetic creations than their type 22 counterparts, the type 53 was created as a command and control unit, as well as a test bed for advanced genetic manipulation. the type 53 has a targeting computer surgically installed in its head, enabling it to designate a target to its comrades. genetic meddling has given them immense strength and speed, but once again at the cost of extremely rapid cellular decay. powers power 22px resistance auto, +res(lethal, smash) +run speed this power grants the ghoul some minor resistance to lethal and smashing damage. ==== improved type 53 ==== more advanced genetic creations than their type 22 counterparts, the type 53 was created as a command and control unit, as well as a test bed for advanced genetic manipulation. the type 53 has a targeting computer surgically installed in its head, enabling it to designate a target to its comrades. genetic meddling has given them immense strength and speed, but once again at the cost of extremely rapid cellular decay. powers === bosses === ==== dr. hetzfeld ==== main article: dr. hetzfeld dr. hetzfeld is a brilliant, albeit mad scientist. such is his disdain of neuron's position as praetor of the sciences the hetzfeld has taken to modifying his own mind and body to put him on a more even footing when it comes to physical capability. he still believes himself to be the superior scientist, and will stop at nothing to prove that to the world. powers ==== type 90 ==== right 125px thumb advanced genetic abominations; the type 90 appears to be intended as a mass produced replacement for powers division members. they are stronger, faster, and tougher than their compatriots, leading them from the front and inspiring them to fight harder and longer than humanly possible. genetic meddling has given them immense strength and speed, but once again at the cost of extremely rapid cellular decay. powers power 22px resistance auto, +res(lethal, smash) +run speed this power grants the ghoul some minor resistance to lethal and smashing damage. ==== improved type 90 ==== advanced genetic abominations; the type 90 appears to be intended as a mass produced replacement for power's division members. they are stronger, faster, and tougher than their compatriots, leading them from the front and inspiring them to fight harder and longer than humanly possible. genetic meddling has given them immense strength and speed, but once again at the cost of extremely rapid cellular decay. powers === elite bosses === ==== noble savage ==== 125px thumb main article: noble savage the form of a savage monster hides the heart of a noble hero. betrayed by those he trusted, the noble savage has risen above thoughts of vengeance and still seeks to == overview == the fir bolg are a faction in city of heroes, native to the croatoa area. == background == == villain types == === minions === ==== soldier ==== thumb 100px soldier50px thumb hidden spawn in times of old, the fir bolg battled the invading tuatha de dannan for control of ireland. here in croatoa, history seems to be repeating itself. the two tribes, transported across an ocean and transformed into monstrous shapes, are waging an eternal war. powers or === lieutenants === ==== guardian ==== 100px thumb fir bolg guardian in times of old, the fir bolg battled the invading tuatha de dannan for control of ireland. here in croatoa, history seems to be repeating itself. the two tribes, transported across an ocean and transformed into monstrous shapes, are waging an eternal war. powers === bosses === ==== streng ==== 100px thumb streng the fir bolg honor the legend of streng, the hero who once championed their people. many fir bolg have now earned the right to bear the ancient hero's name -- usually through acts of great violence against the tuatha de dannan. powers === giant monsters === ==== eochai ==== thumb right 100px eochai main article: eochai long ago, king eochai ruled the fir bolg. today, these monstruous pumpkin-headed giants roam croatoa. in part they are remnants of eochai´s own spirit, in part they are summoned by the united fury of his tormented people. powers :pumpkin patch :: power 22px resistance eochai resistance. === named mobs === * maolan (streng) * miach (streng) * seamus (streng) * siollan (streng) == related badges == category:enemies

== overview == the forlorn are the ghouls in first ward who have been released and are capable of thought. == background == == villain types == === minions === ==== liberated brawler ==== 100px right thumb former ghouls, these forlorn have been displaced to first ward like the rest of their kind. despite being cured of their bloodlust, they retain a semblance of the strength and damage resistance of their more feral cousins. levels: 20-34 powers power 22px damage resistance the midnight masters are naturally resistant to several types of damage. === lieutenants === ==== rehabilitated soldier ==== 100px right thumb rehabilitated soldiers often lead other forlorn into battle, drawing on their years of military training, tactical acumen, and advanced weaponry to protect their delicate and always-contested standing in first ward. levels: 20-34 powers power 22px damage resistance the midnight masters are naturally resistant to several types of damage. === bosses === ==== forlorn commando ==== 100px right thumb back when they were ghouls, the forlorn commandos were subject to praetor berry's most reckless and dubious genetic experiments. now cured of their insatiable hunger, they serve as the elite shocktroops of the various forlorn cadres strewn throughout the tunnels of first ward. levels: 20-34 powers power 22px damage resistance the midnight masters are naturally resistant to several types of damage. === named bosses === ==== demetrios vasilikos ==== 100 px thumb main article: demetrios vasilikos demetrios vasilikos has dedicated himself to undoing the terrible work that his research has done in the hands of praetor berry. after realizing that calvin scott and the resistance saw the rehabilitated ghouls to be little more than shock troops in their crusade against cole, demetrios fled with his people, now known as the forlorn, to first ward. it is here that demetrios hopes to continue his research and help the people whose lives his genetic experimentation has ruined. powers power 22px ghoulish inspiration toggle, point blank area of effect, team +damage, +tohit, while the ghoul manslayer is not held he will boost the damage, chance to hit and resistance to status effects of nearby allies. power 22px resistance auto, , +speed this power grants the ghoul some minor resistance to lethal and smashing damage. === elite bosses === ==== noble savage ==== 100px thumb right main article: noble savage distraught over his transformation into a cybernetic monstrosity, the noble savage has teamed up with demetrios vasilikos to help those whose lives were also ruined by praetor berry's experiments. he sees himself as the defender of the defenseless, the sheriff of first ward, and the protector of both the forlorn and ghouls alike. he will not rest until justice has been done, and praetor berry pays for his crimes against humanity. but one thing at a time, for now he has to concentrate on keeping his people safe. powers power 22px integration toggle, self , +regeneration you can integrate your mind and body, making you resistant to knockback, disorient, hold, sleep, and immobilization effects, as well as increase your regeneration rate, for as long as you can keep this toggle power active. === named enemies === * warden gorzi (forlorn commando) found in enter the forlorn tunnels from palatine * forlorn guard (liberated brawler, rehabilitated soldier) found in enter the forlorn tunnels from palatine category:enemies

== overview == the freakshow are an enemy group in city of heroes and city of villains. this group of cyber-anarchists only respect one law: the survival of the strongest. they can be found between levels 20 and 40 typically, though it is still possible to find groups of them in the 40-50 range as well. == background == left freakshow official info ( copied from the city of heroes official website http://web.archive.org/web/20121025114318/http://na.cityofheroes.com/en/game_info/know_your_adversary/freakshow.php ): guns and drugs have long gone hand in hand with crime, and no gang of criminals exemplifies this fact more than the freakshow. started as a typical street gang over a decade ago, the freakshow has evolved (or devolved, if you prefer) into one of the most feared and hated criminal organizations in paragon city. the freakshow is no ordinary street gang; although it operates much like any other pack of hoodlums, it has one advantage other gangs would (and have tried to) kill for: super powers. normally a group like the freakshow would never have access to the kind of power enhancing chemicals that have today become a staple of their daily diet nor the hardware and weaponry with which they festoon their bodies. unfortunately for the rest of the city, fortune decided to smile upon the freakshow one fateful night. the gang hijacked an armored truck transporting experimental drugs for crey industries. never ones to shy away from trying new and potentially lethal drugs, some of the members decided to try out the truck's contents on themselves. the drug in question was an experimental physical booster program developed for the military. the compound warped and expanded their bodies over the period of just a few hours, giving them superhuman physical attributes, incredible pain tolerance and a powerful narcotic buzz. it also allowed them to expand their own abilities beyond the physical boost the serum provides. cybernetic enhancements are a relatively new and untested innovation, and few people's bodies can handle the experimental limb and organ replacements. the regenerative properties the super serum provides allow freakshow members' bodies to handle the implants with relative ease. once the freakshow realized this they wasted no time in ‘cybering up.’ it was at this point that a true leader stepped forward from the freakshow's ranks. one of its founders, who calls himself simply dreck, had long been the brains behind the operation and decided it was time his rank of president became official. he had to beat down two dozen other challengers to seize the position, but once he'd established supremacy dreck finally gave the freakshow the vision it needed to press forward. dreck and the freakshow began to preach a philosophy of rage unleashed. they tapped into feelings of impotence; particularly among young twenty-something men who had ‘good jobs’ that offered no hope or joy. young men who wanted to lash out at the world because they couldn't find it within themselves to find meaning. they were looking for someone, anyone to provide that meaning and, unfortunately, a number of them turned to a man named dreck. while they seem to have no central base of operations, their activities recently are more organized than previously. in some dangerous parts of the city, they have a dread influence over whole neighborhoods. they also seem to have access to new and more deadly cyberware enhancements, making them a more deadly threat than ever. the freakshow seem to have made their headquarters in "carnival town", which is in a wasted area of crey's folly. they have also set up a base of operations on sharkhead isle. == architect entertainment description == gettin' their freak on in a wasted area of the crey's folly zone known as carnival town, the freakshow are a group of rage-fueled, cybernetically enhanced gang bangers. their leader, 'president dreck', assumed his role by beating down two dozen challengers. with an area of influence that has grown all the way to sharkhead isle and access to newer and more deadly cyberware, the freaks will be coming soon to a theatre near you. == villain types == === minions === ==== freak buckshot ==== the dregs of freakshow society, the freaks are newbies who haven't earned their metal yet. they have to prove themselves by using axes, bats, guns, lived to tell the tale. levels: 30-54 powers power 22px resistance auto, self you are resistant to smashing, lethal and cold damage, but are vulnerable to energy damage. === archvillains === ==== clamor ==== main article: clamor thumb 100px clamor eve van dorn has had a hard time finding friends as dedicated to violence as she is. for a while she found a home in the council's previous regime, but she could only advance so far in such an organization. so she turned to the freakshow. under the name clamor, eve has had no trouble rallying other freaks to her banner. levels: 20-25 powers power 22px resistance archvillain resistance. ==== bile ==== main article: bile thumb 100px bile ralph francesco was an early member of the nihilistic group that would later become the freakshow. his experience as an army veteran made it inevitable that he would become one of the organization's top men. because of this lofty position, ralph was one of the first to undergo cybernetic augmentation. henceforth, he became known only as bile. levels: 31-44 powers power 22px resistance , +maxhp archvillain resistance. ==== t3h g0ld3n rl0l3r ==== thumb right 100px after having his namesake car destroyed at the hands of dr. aeon's villains, the golden roller took his leave of the gold brickers. instead, he brought the remains of his precious vehicle and joined the freakshow in sharkhead, forging a new identity for himself amongst his freak peers. unfortunately, with their strength diminished after losing the freaklok separatists, freakshow on sharkhead continued to lose territory to arachnos raids. captured in one such raid, the golden roller was swiftly deemed an 'mvp' target and transferred directly to grandville's central holding block. levels: 40-55 powers power 22px enchanted impervium golden body auto: self + , +maxhp, +spd, +jump resistance ==== m1st3r b1gsh0t ==== super stunners undergo a very specific and unusual cybernetic enhancement, one that sets them apart from all other freaks and does strange things to their brains. even juicers and stunners are amazed at the amount of hardware stuffed into a super stunner. a network of electrical wiring and emitters allows the super stunners to shoot forth great gouts of electrical energy that allows them to dominate their foes. levels: 40-54 powers ==== dreck ==== thumb 100px dreck main article: dreck born daniel watson, dreck is the glue that holds the militantly independent freakshow together. the freaks may chafe at his orders, they may laugh at his haircut, but they all have to respect dreck's absolute lust for violence. levels: 45-54 powers power 22px resistance archvillain resistance. === named bosses === == related badges == category:enemies == notes == * the mad freak slammer's
