== overview == left the powers division is the section of emperor cole's security forces that is composed almost completely of super-powered people or entities. just because you have super powers doesn't mean you're better than anybody. it means you have a civic duty to serve. in praetoria, if you have super powers, want to carry a gun or other weapon, or are an expert in unarmed combat, you join the powers division. this means any praetorian player character is automatically part of the powers division. it's the law. the powers division has a 100% recruitment rate. the powers division is a special division of the praetorian police department: the ppd. most of the ppd do the day-to-day maintenance of the peace, but the powers division is called in for missions that require special skills. praetor white is head of the powers division. while not actually a rank, praetor white often refers to his top dogs, his best members in the powers division. == enemy types == === bosses === ==== aria ==== main article: aria as dangerous as she is beautiful, aria is the alluring siren of the powers division's top dogs. her mastery over illusion has allowed her to defeat rivals without lifting a finger, and her musical laughter can quickly turn deadly if you cross her. powers power 22px group invisibility pbaoe, team stealth, makes you and all teammates around you invisible. while invisible, you and your teammates are almost impossible to detect. even if discovered, group invisibility grants a bonus to your defense to all attacks, although you will lose some of your defense bonus if you attack. group invisibility has no movement penalty. power 22px sonic dispersion toggle, pbaoe, ally , you create a large field of sonic waves, protecting all allies inside. the sonic dispersion gives all allies within increased resistance against all damage except psionic. the sonic bubble also protects allies from immobilization, disorient, and hold effects. ==== cleopatra ==== right 100px thumb main article: cleopatra cleopatra is a woman who has fought every moment to get where she is today. despite having everything she could have when she was growing up, she wanted to live the life of a fighter. she received nothing but the best training and has proven herself to not only be a high ranking member of the loyalists, but also praetor white's girlfriend. powers power 22px high pain tolerance auto, self , +maxhp you have a greater tolerance to pain than others. you are also slightly resistant to all types of damage. this power is always on and costs no endurance. ==== reese ==== right 100px thumb main article: reese cocky and self-centered, reese has good reason to throw his weight around powers division. of all of marauder's top dogs none have risen higher or faster than him. no other powers division member can match reese's strength, skill, and cunning, a point he makes abundantly clear with the broken bodies of those who would dare challenge him. powers reese gains the following at levels 50-54 power 22px static shield toggle, self , , resist(endurance debuff, recovery debuff) when you toggle on this power, you are surrounded in a charged field that makes you highly resistant to smashing, lethal, fire, cold, energy and negative energy damage. this static shield protects you from hold, sleep, and disorient effects as well as endurance drain, recovery debuffs and enemy teleportation. static shield can also help normalize your synaptic activity, granting you good resistance to psionic damage. power 22px resistance auto, villains are resistant to lethal, smashing, energy, fire and cold damage. ==== riptide ==== right 110px thumb main article: riptide riptide's frightening appearance is matched only by his brutality in combat. he can discharge lethal amounts of bio-electricity on anyone who gets too close, while clusters of retractable poisonous spines discourage anyone from staying within arms reach. despite his monstrous countenance, riptide is an honorable man outside of combat, but start a fight with him, and all semblance of civility is tabled until victory is had. powers power 22px charged armor toggle: self + when you toggle on this power, you are surrounded in a charged field that makes you highly resistant to smashing, lethal and energy damage. power 22px conductive shield toggle: self + when you toggle on this power, you are surrounded in a conductive shield that will conduct many sorts of energy away from your body. conductive shield grants high resistant to fire, cold, and energy damage, as well as good resistance to negative energy damage. ==== stern ==== right 140px thumb main article: stern stern has been replacing his body with cybernetics his entire life. born a quadriplegic, stern's only dream was to be a hero and to help others. he was given that chance when a mysterious benefactor offered to give him the body of a true hero. he has since gained recognition amongst the powers division and earned a place in the top dogs. his steady detachment from humanity, however, has given him a reputation as a ruthless and uncaring adversary. powers power 22px deflection toggle, self , your mastery of the shield allows you to easily deflect melee attacks, and attacks that do get through your ironclad defenses tend to do less damage. while deflection is active the user will gain defense to melee attacks and some minor resistance to lethal and smashing damage. power 22px true grit auto, self , +maxhp your intense training has left you tougher than even the hardiest of heroes. you gain additional hit points and resistance to fire, cold, energy, negative energy and toxic damage sources. this power is always on and costs no endurance. ==== warrant ==== right 100px thumb main article: warrant determined and dependable, warrant rose from the ranks of the ppd and into the powers division. his custom armor is not only symbolic of his dedication to praetoria, but it also packs quite a bit more punch than the gear issued to the police. powers ==== zane ==== right 100px thumb main article: zane zane and reese have had a rivalry since they both joined powers division. constantly chasing reese for the top spot, zane has remained adamant that he can and will defeat reese, a claim he has yet to prove. despite this, zane is tougher than any other top dog, and has earned the respect of powers division as a strong and honorable ally. powers power 22px kinetic shield toggle, self , resist(defense debuff) kinetic shield creates a harmonic energy aura that can deflect physical attacks. your defense to smashing and lethal attacks is increased as weapons and powers like bullets, blades and punches tend to deflect off the shield. kinetic shield also grants you good resistance to defense debuffs. the energy based nature of kinetic shield also offers some minimal defense to energy attacks. power 22px dampening field auto, self your body resonates a mild dampening field that absorbs kinetic energy from physical weapons. this auto power permanently reduces all incoming smashing and lethal damage. this power is always on and costs no endurance. power 22px power shield toggle, self , resist(defense debuff) this power shield creates a electro-magnetic shield around you that can deflect non-physical attacks. your defense to fire, cold, energy and negative energy attacks is increased as these attacks are reflected or refracted off the shield. power shield also grants you good resistance to defense debuffs. power 22px energy protection auto, self your ability to channel energy makes you naturally resistant to energy, negative energy and toxic damage. this power is always on and costs no endurance. category: enemies category:praetorians category:going rogue

== overview == practice robots are a non-combat enemy group, found in the outbreak tutorial zone and the rikti war zone. they have no attacks and are immobile. == description == this group has no official background. == villain types == === minions === ==== deactivated rikti drone ==== 200px thumb this deactivated rikti drone is not very powerful. it would take three such drones to challenge a single hero. level:1 powers power 22px resistance self auto res all practice robots cannot be destroyed. mag( ) res( ) prot( ) === lieutenants === ==== deactivated rikti drone ==== 100px thumb this rikti drone is somewhat more advanced, and can battle a single hero to a standstill. level:2 powers power 22px resistance self auto res all practice robots cannot be destroyed. power 22px resistance self auto res all practice robots cannot be destroyed. mag( ) res( ) prot( ) ==== practice dummy ==== 100px thumb a training dummy. it allows trainess and pros alike to get used to hand to hand combat against the rikti foes. level:35 powers power 22px resistance self auto res all practice robots cannot be destroyed. power 22px resistance self auto res all practice robots cannot be destroyed. mag( ) res( ) prot( ) === bosses === ==== deactivated rikti drone ==== 100px thumb this is the most advanced of the rikti drones. its weaponry and defenses make it a threat best taken on by several heroes at once. level:3 powers power 22px resistance self auto res all practice robots cannot be destroyed. power 22px resistance self auto res all practice robots cannot be destroyed. mag( ) res( ) prot( ) === unused enemies === ==== paper target (lieutenant) ==== a shooting target. it allows trainess and pros alike to get used to ranged combat against the rikti foes. level:35 powers power 22px resistance self auto res all practice robots cannot be destroyed. power 22px resistance self auto res all practice robots cannot be destroyed. mag( ) res( ) prot( ) category:enemies

== overview == pretorian clockwork are an ally and enemy group in praetoria. clockwork are ubiquitous throughout praetoria. created by anti-matter and neuron, several types exist that perform different functions. they are seen throughout the cities and beneath them. == background == == sales pitch == left 200px neuron technologies unlimited provides the latest in personal-, public-, and government-issued clockwork servitors. our new production line is leaps and bounds ahead of last year's model, featuring mirror finish chrome highlights, multiple voice print recognition, and a self-recharging power source. with everyone working hard toward a brighter future, how is a growing family supposed to enjoy a nourishing home-cooked meal in a household free of clutter? the answer, of course, is the home companion, the latest from neuron technologies unlimited. the home companion comes preprogrammed with over nine thousand home care routines: meal preparations, school lessons, repair and refurbishing skill sets, and conversation topics. your family will feel complete with the home companion. for the public sector, neuron technologies unlimited has upgraded all existing clockwork with the new type 40. the new type 40 features a much kinder exterior, thus promoting happiness and well-being. its carbon titanium shell is a pleasing titanium white and resistant to all forms of corrosion, ensuring a long service life. all citizens can rest easy knowing that their friendly neighborhood clockwork will also respond to threats to the populace, conducting arrests or creating safe zones in case of a tellurian plague outbreak. at neuron technologies unlimited we take pride in listening to our customers. we hope you take as much pride in our products as we do, and we look forward to meeting the demands of tomorrow, today. :taken from ==overview== the praetorian police department is an ally group and an enemy group in praetoria. == background == left the praetorian police department (ppd) looks and acts, at least on the surface, like a modern day paramilitary police force. it projects a friendly and approachable attitude toward the populace, which it strengthens through good public relations efforts. in reality, the ppd is emperor cole's personal army. it is inflexible in its demand for respect for its authority. to question one of its members is to question the emperor - a man who has saved them and the planet countless times over. when someone speaks out against emperor cole or praetorian matters, the dark side of the ppd emerges, and burly, well-armed officers come into your house in the dead of night and take your loved ones away. left 200px praetorian police officers of the ppd are stationed throughout praetoria. they patrol the streets maintaining order and looking out for trouble. they can also be found in back alleys interrogating citizens regarding any connections they might have to the resistance. members of the ppd include rank and file officers, specialized members of the intelligence division, and extremely experienced and heavily armed members of the tactical engagement strike team (t.e.s.t.). :taken from http://web.archive.org/web/20111201232426/http://goingrogue.na.cityofheroes.com/en/game-info/enemy-groups/ppd.html praetorian police department official enemy group profile == enemy types == === minions === ==== ppd trooper (tutorial) ==== the praetoria police department is charged with the unending duty of maintaining order on the streets of the city. these tireless men and women watch over unending duty of maintaining order on the streets of the city. these tireless men and women watch over praetoria city, dedicating their lives to serving emperor cole...and the populace, of course. that accompanies the arrival of a ppd investigator is enough to send a thrill of fear down the spine of any resident of praetoria. if an investigator has arrived at your door then you should already be planning your full-throated confession. powers power 22px resistance auto, praetorian police body armor grants them some moderate resistance to lethal, smashing and energy attacks. ==== ppd investigator ==== right 100px thumb these senior officers are masters of investigation and uncovering evidence that leads to conviction after conviction. once they are on the trail, no one is safe from their relentless pursuit. no one. powers power 22px resistance auto, praetorian police body armor grants them some moderate resistance to lethal, smashing and energy attacks. ==== ppd sergeant ==== right 100px thumb sergeants are high ranking officers who have worked their way to the top through loyalty and diligence and have been equipped with top of the line 'non-lethal' force weaponry. powers power 22px resistance auto, praetorian police body armor grants them some moderate resistance to lethal, smashing and energy attacks. === elite bosses === ==== interrogator hoffman ==== main article: interrogator hoffman the flash of a silver trenchcoat that accompanies the arrival of a ppd investigator is enough to send a thrill of fear down the spine of any resident of praetoria. if an investigator has arrived at your door then you should already be planning your full-throated confession. === named enemies === ==== warrant officer welks (npc) ==== right 100px thumb main article: officer welks one of the few female officers in the force, sheila welks does a job that few women in praetoria would want to. it's hard work, but welks is proud to be doing it. she was recently promoted to warrant officer after rescuing a fellow officer from destroyers and still managing to bring them into custody, albeit with a few broken bones. ==== investigator donner (npc) ==== right 100px thumb jim donner is known for being the former partner of james noble. the two together were one of the best officers in all of praetoria. after james died serving overseas, jim looked after his wife and child. jim eventually married jennifer and has since sworn to serve the people of praetoria in the name of james noble. ==== chief interrogator washington (boss) ==== right 100px thumb main article: chief interrogator washington washington is a man that only those who seek to harm the safety of praetoria should fear. those who do fear him make sure to avoid him at all cost, due to washington's animal-like instincts and ruthless fighting style. powers power 22px focused fighting toggle, self , , resist(defense debuff) you become more evasive to melee attacks while you have == overview == while praetoria has many people and factions, a select group are specifically known as "praetorians" due to their association with the leadership of praetoria. emperor cole appointed several praetors to help him run the government, and those worthy of the honor are among the most powerful and dangerous beings encountered in the multiverse. almost all of them originate from praetorian earth, though some are from other parallel worlds. the praetors are also known as the praetorian guard, and are exceptionally ruthless in their pursuit of their goals - whether those goals further emperor cole's plans or not. == archvillains & elite bosses == === anti-matter === thumb 100px left main article: anti-matter trapped within his powered armor, anti-matter used to be tyrants primary scientific consultant. he and neuron were once the best of friends and created the clockwork of praetorian earth together. of late his theories have been more and more radical, causing tyrant to lean on neuron for research and analysis. unbeknownst to anyone, anti-matter has cracked the portal tech. he is waiting to reveal his breakthrough in order to garner favor from tyrant and his true love, dominatrix. levels: 40-54 powers power 22px resistance archvillain resistance. === battle maiden === thumb 100px main article: battle maiden battle maiden receives her powers from her halberd, a == overview == this group consists of peacebringer heroes such as sunstorm and moonfire. == background == these kheldians only merge with those who are willing and tend to choose members of law enforcement or other forces for justice in the world as their new hosts. == enemy types == === bosses === ==== moonfire ==== right thumb 100px moonfire main article: moonfire the young woman known as aurelie damiens used to be a humble french art student, visiting paragon city as part of an international exchange program. she was bright and enthusiastic, but, in her eyes at least, nothing special. that all changed one day at the paragon museum of art, when she felt the presence of a dying kheldian touch her mind. aurelie had a choice: she could allow the energy being to fade away entirely; or she could take it upon herself, merging with it, becoming far more than the sum of her parts. to this day, aurelie has no regrets about her choice. as a member of the peacebringer army, she watches over striga isle and the dark forces that shadow it. levels: 25-54 powers power 22px shining shield toggle: self + when you toggle on your shining shield, you create an energy barrier that grants you == overview == the port noble citizen's brigade (appearing ingame as the pncb) are an enemy faction appearing in john houston's arc. == background == during john houston's arc, stephanie peebles explains the pncb's true nature: == enemy types == === minions === ==== port noble patroller ==== right thumb 100px the members of the port noble citizen's brigade are armed citizens standing up for their right and freedoms after the collapse of the council in striga isle. the patrollers are the least trained, and so have been given some special armaments to shore up their lack of expertise. levels: 30-54 powers === lieutenants === ==== brigadier defender ==== right thumb 100px the members of the port noble citizen's brigade are armed citizens standing up for their right and freedoms after the collapse of the council in striga isle. the defenders have a wider array of 'reclaimed' goods from striga storehouses to protect themselves and others. levels: 30-54 powers power 22px resistances resistance === bosses === ==== port noble shot-caller ==== right thumb 100px the members of the port noble citizen's brigade are armed citizens standing up for their right and freedoms after the collapse of the council in striga isle. the shot-callers live up to their names - they are the field generals that keep the citizens motivated and organized. levels: 30-54 powers power 22px tactics toggle, pbaoe, team +tohit, , , +perception while this power is active, your accuracy and that of all your nearby teammates' is increased. your advanced tactics also protect you and your team from confuse effects, as well as your perception so you can detect stealthy foes. power 22px resistances resistance === named bosses === * commandant morricone (port noble shot-caller) found on the a not-so-quiet riot mission from john houston == external links == category:enemies

==overview== in paragon city, the clockwork are a force to be reckoned with. in dimension epsilon tau 27-2, they're a far, far greater threat. their blasts of psychic energy can make seasoned fighters quail before them. you will find the psychic clockwork at least four missions, two from tina macintyre between levels 40 and 45, and the others from unai kemen after level 45, as well as during the lady grey task force. == villain types == === underlings === ==== gear ==== gears emerge from the remnants of destroyed clockwork princes. though tiny, they can still pack quite a punch. powers power 22px resistance auto, clockwork gears are formed from the broken parts of prince clockworks. they are weak and very loosely held together. they have no resistance and are pretty much vulnerable to most damage except lethal. they are particularly vulnerable to psionic damage, sleep and knockback. === minions === ==== sprocket ==== these pint-sized clockwork are a lot tougher than their counterparts in paragon city. powered by the incredible mind of the telekinetic clockwork king, the sprockets can deal out massive bolts of psychic energy. powers power 22px resistance auto, , psychic clockwork minions from dimension epsilon tau 27-2 are vulnerable to knockback. they are, however, resistant to psionic and lethal damage as well as sleep and disorient. ==== prototype oscillator ==== the airborne clockwork oscillators are a deadly threat to flying and grounded heroes alike. like the sprockets, these high-flying mechanical men attack using bolts of psychic energy. they are highly resistant to any psychic attacks. powers power 22px resistance auto, , psychic clockwork minions from dimension epsilon tau 27-2 are vulnerable to knockback. they are, however, resistant to psionic and lethal damage as well as sleep and disorient. === lieutenants === ==== cannon knight ==== the knights make up the bulk of the leadership class within the twisted court of the clockwork king. cannon knights possess powerful, long range psychic attacks. powers power 22px resistance auto, , clockwork dukes are resistant to lethal damage and disorient, but are vulnerable to psionic damage and sleep. ==== knight lance ==== the knights make up the bulk of the leadership class within the twisted court of the clockwork king. cannon knights possess powerful, long range psychic attacks. powers power 22px resistance auto, , clockwork dukes are resistant to lethal damage and disorient, but are vulnerable to psionic damage and sleep. === bosses === ==== cannon duke ==== like any monarch, the clockwork king has his own court, although in his case it's composed of mechanical nobles called dukes. these oversized robots are dangerous foes, possessing powerful long range mental attacks. powers power 22px resistance auto, , clockwork dukes are resistant to lethal damage and disorient, but are vulnerable to psionic damage and sleep. ==== assembler duke ==== like any monarch, the clockwork king has his own court, although in his case it's composed of mechanical nobles called dukes. the assembler dukes can summon more clockwork minions to their side during battle. powers power 22px resistance auto, , clockwork dukes are resistant to lethal damage and disorient, but are vulnerable to psionic damage and sleep. ==== duke lancer ==== like any monarch, the clockwork king has his own court, although in his case it's composed of mechanical nobles called dukes. the dukes lancers are dangerous foes, possessing the ability to dominate foes with their mental powers. powers power 22px resistance auto, , clockwork dukes are resistant to lethal damage and disorient, but are vulnerable to psionic damage and sleep. ==== cannon prince ==== the heirs apparent to the clockwork king's throne, the princes represent the pinnacle of the mad genius' creations. although cannon princes sometimes seem almost human because of their advanced robotic brains, they're still highly resistant to mental attacks and can deal out massive psychic blasts. powers power 22px resistance auto, , , resist(knockback) the clockwork princes are resistant to knockback, disorient, and lethal damage but are vulnerable to psionic damage and sleep. ==== assembler prince ==== the heirs apparent to the clockwork king's throne, the princes represent the pinnacle of the mad genius' creations. assembler prices' powerful psychic attacks can painfully tear at the minds of even the most disciplined heroes. but it's their ability to rapidly produce more clockwork soldiers that makes them truly insidious. powers power 22px resistance auto, , , resist(knockback) the clockwork princes are resistant to knockback, disorient, and lethal damage but are vulnerable to psionic damage and sleep. ==== lance prince ==== the heirs apparent to the clockwork king's throne, the princes represent the pinnacle of the mad genius' creations. although lance princes sometimes seem almost human because of their advanced robotic brains, they possesss the decidedly inhuman ability to dominate their foes with their will. powers power 22px resistance auto, , , resist(knockback) the clockwork princes are resistant to knockback, disorient, and lethal damage but are vulnerable to psionic damage and sleep. === elite bosses === ==== assembler lord ==== the clockwork lords are the commanders of the vast armies of self-constructing automatons at the clockwork king's disposal. the lords are manufacturing powerhouses, quickly assembling assembler dukes, who themselves quickly assemble minions of their own after. if not taken down quickly, these flying menaces can quickly populate a battle with many clockwork reinforcements. powers power 22px resistance auto, , , resist(knockback) the clockwork princes are resistant to knockback, disorient, and lethal damage but are vulnerable to psionic damage and sleep. ==== cannon rook ==== the clockwork rooks take advantage of the clockwork's vast numbers to utilize a sprocket as a pawn, companion, as well as their weapon of choice. when engaged, the champion will grab their sprocket pawn, and channel an energy current through its body to create a super-charged mace for dealing with any opponents who interrupt their work. the ability to psionically insert themselves into their target's focus combined with the clock-face shield they defend themselves with, these champions are one of the clockwork king's favored approaches to dealing with super-powered threats that get in his way. powers power 22px the clock works toggle: self + , + , +res(debuff def) the clockwork champion's mastery of the clock face shield allows them to easily deflect attacks, and attacks that do get through your rustclad defenses tend to do less damage. while the clock is ticking the user will gain defense to most kinds of attacks and some minor resistance to smashing and lethal damage. it can even help them determine what time it is currently, at least twice a day! power 22px phalanx fighting auto: self + , , + per nearby ally fighting very near your allies allows you to deflect attacks much easier. you will gain a small bonus to your smashing, lethal, fire, cold, energy, and negative defense. this bonus grows for each ally near you. this power is always on and costs no endurance. power 22px resistance auto: self + , , resist(knockback) the clockwork princes are resistant to knockback, disorient, sleep, lethal and psionic damage. ==== tesla bishop ==== the clockwork bishops are the most effective psionic conduits of the clockwork king's power, allowing them to channel electricity into a protective and healing energy to bolster the ranks of the kingdom's soldiers. while less sturdy than other ranks of the mechanical army, a bishop left to their own devices can quickly turn the tide of a battlefield by channeling their king's tactical smarts, a strategic advantage that is leveraged to great effect. powers power 22px faraday cage == overview == resistance clockwork are an enemy (and sometimes ally) group in praetoria. == background == resistance clockwork consist of praetorian clockwork that have been reprogrammed by the resistance. clockwork captured or appropriated by the resistance are reprogrammed using taps into the neutropolis wide area networks to speed the process. some become soldiers, others servants; a few become bombs, designed to go back to scrubbing off graffiti and tending flowers until the right trigger is sent. then... 'kaboom.' the clockwork so reprogrammed are not given a choice in the matter. == enemy types == === minions === ==== target dummy ==== right 100px thumb cleaners are designed for simple labor intensive tasks like cleaning, welding, and repairing other clockwork. they have an innocuous appearance, however if threatened they are more than capable of defending themselves. this clockwork has been reprogrammed by the resistance. powers ==== hacked cleaner ==== right 100px thumb cleaners are designed for simple labor intensive tasks like cleaning, welding, and repairing other clockwork. they have an innocuous appearance, however if threatened they are more than capable of defending themselves. this clockwork has been reprogrammed by the resistance. powers ==== hacked sweeper ==== right 100px thumb sweepers are often seen patrolling the street cleaning up litter and debris to make praetoria a more beautiful place to live. they have an innocuous appearance, however if threatened they are more than capable of defending themselves. this clockwork has been reprogrammed by the resistance. powers ==== clockwork seer ==== right thumb 100px you can hear the sound of seer souls trapped within this mechanical body. it appears metronome's process of transference isn't foolproof. powers === lieutenants === ==== hacked builder ==== right 100px thumb should another clockwork android fall due to unforeseen circumstances or job hazards the builders are there to rebuild the fallen android on the job. this clockwork has been reprogrammed by the resistance. powers ==== hacked mender ==== right 100px thumb menders are often seen repairing broken structures and machines, including other androids. their top priority is to keep the other androids in tip-top working condition. this clockwork has been reprogrammed by the resistance. powers ==== mobile sentry turret ==== sentry turret are mobile turrets that ensure the security of sensitive areas. powers ==== sentry turret ==== sentry turret are immobile turrets that ensure the security of sensitive areas. they never leave their post and their plasma gun can reach out and touch anyone even remotely threatening their position. powers === bosses === ==== hacked dismantler ==== right 125px thumb dismantlers are occasionally called in when their plasma torches can be put to use to tear apart crumbling or collapsed buildings. these behemoth androids are the heavy lifters, movers and builders of the android labor units. this clockwork has been reprogrammed by the resistance. powers ==== guardian turret ==== guardian turrets are immobile turrets that ensure the security of sensitive areas. they never leave their post and their plasma cannon can reach out and touch anyone even remotely threatening their position. powers ==== hacked lifter ==== right 125px thumb lifters, as their name indicates, do a lot of the heavy lifting and construction. they are able to easily lift machinery and building materials that previously could only be lifted by powerful cranes. these behemoth androids are the heavy lifters, movers and builders of the android labor units. this clockwork has been reprogrammed by the resistance. powers ==== mobile guardian turret ==== guardian turrets are mobile turrets that ensure the security of sensitive areas. powers == related badges == category:enemies enemy_names: The "Rikti" name is derived from the title of the story Rikki-Tikki-Tavi. http
corpus: == overview == the rikti are an alien race that invaded earth during the rikti war. their invasion was halted due to the heroics of vanguard at the cost of untold lives. they remain entrenched on earth and pose a danger to everyone they encounter. == background == rikti official info (copied from the city of villains official website http://web.archive.org/web/20121025114515/http://na.cityofheroes.com/en/game_info/know_your_adversary/the_rikti.php ) the fact that the rikti invasion is over for the time being does not mean that the other-dimensional invaders are cleansed from the city. in fact, quite the opposite is true. no one knows for sure how many rikti still lurk beneath the streets of paragon city and other great battleground cities like rome and kuala lumpur. some estimates put the number at a few thousand. others suggest that there are ten or twenty times that many still menacing the planet. while the danger of total worldwide enslavement to an alien race seems to have passed for the time being, the rikti still present a daily and ever-growing threat. the affect of the rikti on human culture and society has not been entirely negative. the world they come from is quite a bit more advanced than our own, technologically speaking. during the war and in subsequent raids on rikti cells, heroes have recovered literally thousands of tons of rikti technology. from spaceships to handguns, the rikti brought a startling array of weapons and other technology with them. ever since the first alien energy rifle fell into the hands of a human scientist, we have been learning from their scientific discoveries. the war walls that divide up paragon city employ force fields based on rikti technology. vanguard has begun to employ a prototype 'rapid response' portal system designed after rikti teleporters and many heroes benefit from an emergency teleportation system that sends them directly to a hospital when their life signs reach a critical level. once they get there, they find themselves rejuvenated by hospital beds that repair damage at a cellular level using a system inspired by the rikti transmogrification vats. the benefits reaped from rikti technology have only begun to appear and are certain to transform our entire world in the years to come. right now though, they pose a problem as well. not all of the discarded or lost rikti technology fell into the hands of the heroes and governments of the world. every month, more and more of it makes its way into the hands of paragon city's criminal element. the black market for alien artifacts is booming, with even a simple side arm or communication device selling for tens of thousands of dollars. an early attempt to auction a rikti helmet on ebay™ got a high bid of $35,320 before the government cracked down, arresting the seller and fining the company. a more serious problem came when a local gang found a stash of rikti assault weapons, turning them overnight into a group with the firepower to level a city block in a matter of minutes. fortunately, a group of young heroes captured the gang as they attempted to rob a liquor store, but the potential danger was obvious to everyone (except perhaps the dimwitted thieves). current international laws clearly state that any artifact of alien technology must be immediately turned over to the local government who will then turn it over to the vanguard. the vanguard - in addition to its other duties, has taken on the role of clearinghouse for captured alien technology. they then apportion out the finds to different research facilities around the world. vanguard security personnel are stationed at each of these labs, both to ensure their safety and to see that the scientists share whatever discoveries they make with the rest of the world community. many private research and development firms now operate under government contract to help unlock the potential in captured rikti tech. among the most significant is crey industries, who made some of the earliest and quickest advances in rikti research. they hold the patent on the emergency teleportation system that so many heroes use every day in their fight against evil. however, crey recently lost all of its contracts and was forbidden to work on rikti research after the vanguard discovered that the company possessed a number of rikti weapons and rare suits of advanced combat armor that the rest of the world knew nothing about. the countess crey maintained that it was simply a clerical error, but the vanguard remained unimpressed and seized all the alien artifacts known to be in crey's possession. crey has assured the un that it no longer has any interest in alien research and is pursuing its own projects from now on. higher level contacts reveal that the rikti are in fact descended from humanity. in their own dimension, an advanced alien species of unknown origin converted the humans of the rikti dimension into what they are now. the rikti are born as what we consider ordinary, but around adolescence changes begin, and they begin to morph into full rikti aliens. to this end, humans of prime earth may also be converted into rikti, but usually adults must go through years of regimen before becoming a rikti citizen. the restructurist rikti faction ignores this unlike their traditionalist opposition, and use rikti converts as soldiers. on their world the rikti allowed their gods to die out and have always had an aversion to worshipping supernatural and/or mystical beings. their lack of faith and interest in such things created a vulnerability over time. more recently, members of the restructionist faction within the rikti are reconsidering this position. in fact some of them even have magical powers from their primal earth mu blood. the rikti have also begun questioning their stance on this with the resurgence of the midnight squad. the recent attacks from a purely magical source have cut the rikti more deeply than they’d like to admit. == related groups == border="0" style="width: 50%; border-collapse:collapse; margin-left: 20px" style="width: 50%" file:badge villain new rikti.png rikti (advanced difficulty) == villain types == === underlings === ==== rikti monkey ==== often referred to as ruin monkeys, these horrible creatures were created by the rikti, then let loose in the city to wreak havoc. they roam in packs and pounce with tremendous speed and ferocity. unfortunately, the rikti seem to have a never-ending supply of them. notes: rikti monkeys that appear out of portals are classified as small rather than underlings. levels: 30-33 powers ==== wild rikti monkey ==== 100px thumb rikti monkeys often attack in packs often referred to as ruin monkeys, these horrible creatures were created by the rikti, then let loose in the city to wreak havoc. they roam in packs and pounce with tremendous argot'burwot (chief soldier) == notes == * the "rikti" name is derived from the title of the story rikki-tikki-tavi. http://web.archive.org/web/20120904104845/http://boards.cityofheroes.com/showthread.php?p=203514 == spoilers == === origins === the rikti are, in fact, genetically-modified humans. what drove the people of rikti earth to modify themselves is unknown, but the power of their technology is undeniable. during the short time of the rikti war, they nearly exterminated all of earth's superheroes. according to portal corp intel, the rikti weren't a particularly hostile people when their world was initially discovered a few years prior to the invasion. however, the current government on the rikti earth, (the lineage of war) decided to invade our world. there is evidence that nemesis was some how involved with bringing the low to power. === history === the rikti exterminated all who believed in any gods, starving the gods of the faith that sustained them. this resulted in the gods’ death (apparently, they would like to do the same on primal earth – hence their hostility toward the circle of thorns, who worship ermeeth). their lack of faith and interest in such things created a vulnerability over time. more recently, members of the restructionist faction (see further down) within the rikti are reconsidering this position. in fact some of them even have magical powers from their primal earth mu blood. the rikti have also begun questioning their stance on this with the resurgence of the midnight squad. the recent attacks from a purely magical source have cut the rikti more deeply than they’d like to admit. === present day === the war ended when the omega team (composed mostly of mages) went through the rikti portal to their home world and created a magical barrier that prevents inter-dimensional travel between our two worlds. recently, the rikti faction on earth was able to develop a small, tenuous portal back to their homeworld, which becomes the focus of many missions for vanguard. due to the events of the second rikti invasion, the rikti are now hostile to all other enemy groups, and will attack them if they spawn close to each other. === rikti factions === after the first rikti war, and during the second rikti war, two distinct factions of rikti became apparent: the traditionalists and the restructurists. much of this information can be found in serpent drummer's story arc dreams of peace and acts of war as well as angus mcqueen's story arc division: line. ==== rikti traditionalists ==== the rikti are traditionally pacifists, calling upon the lineage of war only in dire times. the rikti traditionalists seek an end to the war, to return to their once peaceful ways and re-open communication and understanding between earth and the rikti homeworld. the traditionalists are willing to integrate the fully converted lost into their society but do not consider them true rikti. ==== rikti restructurists ==== the restructurist faction is headed by the lineage of war, which seeks a higher place of stature within the rikti society. using the war with earth as a tool to this end, they aim to shape rikti society into a militaristic culture led by the rikti lord of war. a diplomatic end to the war would destroy this ambition, however, which make the traditionalists on earth a threat to them. due to their lack of numbers on earth, the restructurists welcome the converted lost as pure rikti. ===apocrypha=== according to the version of the story bible released, and generally confirmed by the lore ama, the "true rikti" were a star-faring race whose planet became uninhabitable (due to either their star going nova or an environmental disaster). they were able to send out many generational ships, one of which landed on earth in an alternate dimension thousands of years ago. due to an unforeseen incompatibility with the ecosystem, the true rikti were rendered sterile, and unable to reproduce. they discovered that with their advanced technology, they could modify humans to become rikti. however, some of the gods and humans of this dimension's earth opposed this transformation, and war broke out. because the gods were sustained by magic and worship, following the defeat of a god, the true rikti established themselves as the new gods, to prevent the defeated gods from reforming due to the prayers of their followers. this led to a process by which humans are converted into rikti not just physically, but mentally as well, to prevent them from worshiping, and thereby reforming, the old gods. eventually, modified humans became rikti, and because they were ready for it, were told the truth of their origins without danger of worshiping the old gods. for the most part, this worked, and the legacy of the true rikti on earth continued for millennia even after the original true rikti died out. their human heirs had plenty of time and knowledge to explore scientific advances, and developed instantaneous telepathic communication and teleportation technology, and achieved a sort of utopia. unfortunately, records of a time before the true rikti began their transformations surfaced, and it was revealed that they had originally intended to live side by side with humans. this caused a schism in rikti society, leading a small minority of rikti to be persecuted for their beliefs that the transformation was a bad thing, and was holding "humanity" back from its true potential. this group would have been largely forgotten, had it not been for nemesis' attack on the rikti homeworld. using automatons of primal earth's heroes and old rikti gods, nemesis led the rikti to believe that primal earth heroes and gods had attacked them. this gave the persecuted "human" rikti hope, and helped lead to the end of the rikti war. omega team was prepared to sacrifice themselves to destroy the main rikti base when they entered the main rikti portal, but were contacted by this small group of dissenters. a god had been resurrected, and was able to work with omega team to create a magical shield to block rikti earth from primal earth. the spell to create the shield also had the side effect of letting the entire world know what had happened - the gods had returned, and had ended a brutal war. this bolstered the dissenters ranks, but also led to the main government cracking down on them. it is largely unknown what happened on rikti earth following this event, but some members of omega team survived to fight the rikti, while ruin took over the equivalent of the australian continent. == related badges == category:enemies category:rikti lore

==overview== rogue arachnos is an enemy faction. they are commonly found in warburg. established as a splinter faction of arachnos, they are actively opposed to the "softly, softly" approach taken by lord recluse, and support marshal blitz. given the threat that the rockets of warburg present to the world, the rogue arachnos faction seek to use them to their full capabilities as weapons. as a result, members of arachnos are forced to choose: to support lord recluse and resist launching the rockets and thus potentially plunging the world into thermonuclear war, or to use them as the threat and leverage they are to bend the world to the will of marshal blitz? == villain types == === underlings === ==== rogue spiderling ==== 175px thumb these attack drones are used to soften up super-powered targets. arachnos considers them very expendable, and as such uses them to record and monitor a threat's abilities before more expensive troops-such as tarantulas or fortunatas are deployed. levels: 30-40 powers power 22px resistance auto, arachnobots are resistant to lethal, smashing, energy, fire and cold damage. === minions === ==== rogue crab spider slicer ==== 175px thumb terrible treatment of some sort to properly graft with the suit. levels: 29-54 powers power 22px armored exoskeleton auto, self resistance === elite bosses === ==== blitzkrieg ==== 200px right thumb marshal blitz's personal flyer has been miniaturized and equipped with stolen ordinance. levels: 35-54 powers :after effects : power 22px resistance archvillain resistance. ==== marshal blitz ==== 100px right thumb main article: marshal blitz marshal jason blitz used to be the arachnos marshal for the isle of warburg, one of the western-most rogue isles, and is today the de facto ruler of it. marshal blitz commands a contingent of rogue arachnos that took over warburg and uses its rockets to threaten paragon city. marshal jason blitz believed lord recluse wasn't acting fast enough in his bid to take over the world. he found it tragic that the web had developed so many incredible weapons and none of them were being used on the hated heroes! when blitz learned he was dying of cancer, he decided to speed things up a bit so that he could live to see the defeat of paragon city. he murdered governor melody harkness and took over the city with a cadre of troops loyal to him. soon after, he demolished the false faþade on the warburg rocket at the centre of his city and started firing warheads armed with various toxins at paragon city. lord recluse promised the un he would rectify the situation, but his troops have so far been stalemated by their rivals. (or so recluse claims.) levels: 30-54 powers power 22px bane spider armor auto: self + , , , +maxhp your bane spider armor upgrade improves your overall health, protection to all damage types, as well as increasing your protection against most status effects, including confuse, fear, disorient, hold, sleep and immobilize effects. === named bosses === * amelee (rogue fortunata mistress) found on the help phipps in his plan against the arachnos rebels from westin phipps. * traitor falks (rogue mu guardian) found on the stop the rebels and recover the data from westin phipps. * traitor morrow (rogue crab spider longfang) found on the stop the rebels and recover the data from westin phipps. category:enemies

== overview == rogue clockwork are a praetorian faction. they consist of praetorian clockwork that are considered glitched or malfunctioning; and might be under the control of metronome. praetorians encounter them in the story arcs of alec parson and penelope yin, among other places. == background == == enemy types == === minions === ==== glitched cleaner ==== right thumb 100px cleaners are designed for simple labor intensive tasks like cleaning, welding, and repairing other clockwork. they have an innocuous appearance, however if threatened they are more than capable of defending themselves. these clockwork appear to be malfunctioning. powers ==== glitched sweeper ==== right thumb 100px sweepers are often seen patrolling the street cleaning up litter and debris to make praetoria a more beautiful place to live. they have an innocuous appearance, however if threatened they are more than capable of defending themselves. these clockwork appear to be malfunctioning. powers === lieutenants === ==== glitched builder ==== right thumb 100px should another clockwork android fall due to unforeseen circumstances or job hazards the builders are there to rebuild the fallen android on the job. these clockwork appear to be malfunctioning. powers ==== glitched mender ==== right thumb 100px menders are often seen repairing broken structures and machines, including other androids. their top priority is to keep the other androids in tip-top working condition. these clockwork appear to be malfunctioning. powers ==== mobile sentry turret ==== sentry turret are mobile turrets that ensure the security of sensitive areas. powers ==== sentry turret ==== sentry turret are immobile turrets that ensure the security of sensitive areas. they never leave their post and their plasma gun can reach out and touch anyone even remotely threatening their position. powers === bosses === ==== glitched dismantler ==== right thumb 125px dismantlers are occasionally called in when their plasma torches can be put to use to tear apart crumbling or collapsed buildings. these behemoth androids are the heavy lifters, movers and builders of the android labor units. these clockwork appear to be malfunctioning. powers ==== guardian turret ==== guardian turrets are immobile turrets that ensure the security of sensitive areas. they never leave their post and their plasma cannon can reach out and touch anyone even remotely threatening their position. powers ==== glitched lifter ==== right thumb 125px lifters, as their name indicates, do a lot of the heavy lifting and construction. they are able to easily lift machinery and building materials that previously could only be lifted by powerful cranes. these behemoth androids are the heavy lifters, movers and builders of the android labor units. these clockwork appear to be malfunctioning. powers ==== mobile guardian turret ==== guardian turrets are mobile turrets that ensure the security of sensitive areas. powers === elite bosses === ==== metronome mk i ==== this monstrous construct is being pieced together from numerous stock and customized clockwork parts. it appears to be quite a different machine than any clockwork you've ever seen. powers ==== metronome mk ii ==== this monstrosity is a physical manifestation of the malignant clockwork virus known as metronome. it incorporates various parts from existing clockwork, but hints of a brilliant design greater than the parts are clearly evident. powers ==== metronome mk iii ==== this monstrosity is a physical manifestation of the malignant clockwork virus known as metronome. it incorporates various parts from existing clockwork, including powerful integral weaponry, but hints of a brilliant design greater than the parts are clearly evident. powers === named bosses === * metronome prototype (glitched lifter) * signal carrier (glitched dismantler) :this appears to be the signal carrier that alec parson told you about. == external links == category: enemies category:praetorians category:going rogue

== overview == the rogue island police is a very minor faction in city of villains. this group is apparently under arachnos rule officially. this corrupt police force is one of the first tests a villain will face, and can be found between levels 1 and 10, as well as protecting certain banks in the rogue isles at higher levels. this villain group is not present in paragon city, nor anywhere else in city of heroes. == background == rogue island police official info ( copied from the city of villains official website http://web.archive.org/web/20121025114602/http://na.cityofheroes.com/en/game_info/know_your_adversary/rogue_island_police.php ): often found guarding banks, expensive homes, and private clubs, the rogue island police are a vast network of security forces that patrol the isles. police chief kyle “cal” calhoun is well known among the elite of the rogue isles. a blustery, corpulent man who is welcome at the finest parties and swankiest restaurants, calhoun rubs shoulders with those closest to lord recluse and has been accused of running his organization as recluse’s personal dragoon. indeed, tales of abuse, evidence planting, and general corruption surround the rip as they enforce a somewhat unique interpretation of the “law” across arachnos territory. word on the street is that the rip gather their recruits from dirty ex-cops of paragon, soldiers gone bad, and paramilitary buffs with something to prove. seen as on the take and power hungry, few citizens believe that they are there to protect and serve. although rumors oftheir malfeasance have surfaced many times, those who complain have always retracted their accusations against calhoun and his officers. even if they do only look after the interests of the highest bidder, their tactics of fear, intimidation, and violence inadvertently prevent crime from getting out of control on the rogue isles. whether on the take or not, the rip can be a dangerous foe to anyone that might interfere with that which they are well paid to protect. == enemy types == === minions === ==== rip ==== 100px thumb rip working as a private security guard in a 'city of villains' must be a very tough job. levels: 1-4 powers ==== rip ==== 100px thumb rip, heist working as a private security guard in a 'city of villains' must be a == overview == the rogue isles villains is an enemy group in city of heroes, but act as allies in city of villains. they can be found during mayhem missions or safeguard missions. during mayhem missions as part of a side mission, they can be found in jail waiting for help to break out. if they are rescued, they will become an ally and help you for the duration of the mission. during safeguard missions, they are attempting to rob the bank and must be stopped by heroes. also as part of a side mission, they may be found in the precinct jail where villain groups are trying to free them, if heroes don't prevent it. during the statesman task force, a full team of these villains can be found near the thorn tree. many of these villains can also be found alone or even in pairs talking among themselves in many of the architect entertainment buildings present in the rogue isles as non-aggressive npcs. == enemy types == === bosses === ==== comatorium ==== 100px thumb main article: comatorium a shut in for most of his life, comatorium went crazy when his apartment burnt down with his mother in it. he made the decision after the fire that everyone around him had to pay for his loss. levels: 1-10 powers ==== icecap ==== right thumb 100px icecap main article: icecap orphaned in the bitter-cold mountains of nepal this young man made a pact with the harsh spirits of frost and ice to bring their pain wherever he walked. levels: 1-10 powers ==== blood thorn ==== 100px thumb main article: blood thorn born in the brazilian rainforest where the greed from ranchers had taken her home and family at a young age. she decided that the human race needed to be destroyed before they destroy the earth completely. levels: 6-10 powers ==== martial gloom ==== 100px thumb main article: martial gloom once a force to be reckoned within the freedom corps organization, martial gloom went insane after seeing innocent bystanders die in a fire fight and vowed to take the freedom corps down himself. levels: 11-15 powers ==== echidna ==== right thumb 100px echidna main article: echidna echidna has been cursed with a monstrous visage all her life. with few options open to her, she took up the persona of the horrific greek goddess and unleashed her fury on the unsuspecting world. levels: 11-20 powers ==== pyra ==== 100px thumb main article: pyra once a beauty queen pageant winner that lost her looks when the building a pageant she was in burnt down. she vowed to make everyone suffer the way that she did that fateful day of fire. levels: 11-20, 30-54 powers power 22px fire shield (only levels 11-20) toggle, self while this power is active, you get a good resistance to lethal, smashing and fire damage. fire shield also provides minimal resistance to cold damage. ==overview== in their attempts to create even more intelligent robots than the deadly machines they currently field, the council has added organical material to them, thus creating unwillingly artificial life. now these creations have developed their own plans and have turned against their masters. this faction is present only in coh, and will only spawn during its own mini-story arc, available from merisel valenzuela or allison king. (levels 30 - 34) == background == there is no official background about this group at this time. == villain types == === minions === ==== zenith mech man ==== 100px thumb these former council robots have achieved sentience and no longer obey their programming. they now seek to further only their own inhuman goals. powers power 22px resistance , resistance ==== zenith hoverbot ==== 175px thumb these former council robots have achieved sentience and no longer obey their programming. they now seek to further only their own inhuman goals. powers power 22px resistance , resistance === lieutenants === ==== mk i zenith warcry ==== 175px thumb these former council robots have achieved sentience and no longer obey their programming. they now seek to further only their own inhuman goals. powers power 22px resistance zenith warcries are highly resistant to knockback. power 22px resistance , resistance === bosses === ==== mk ii zenith warcry ==== 175px thumb these former council robots have achieved sentience and no longer obey their programming. they now seek to further only their own inhuman goals. powers power 22px resistance zenith warcries are highly resistant to knockback. power 22px resistance , resistance === named bosses === * prototype a12 (mk ii zenith warcry) * prototype b15 (mk ii zenith warcry) * progenitor runtime 001 (mk ii zenith warcry) category:enemies

== overview == == enemy types == === bosses === ==== echidna ==== right thumb 100px echidna main article: echidna echidna has been cursed with a monstrous visage all her life. with few options open to her, she took up the persona of the horrific greek goddess and unleashed her fury on the unsuspecting world. levels: 15-24 powers ==== pincher ==== right thumb 100px pincher pincher is a professional thief sometimes working out of striga isle. her ability to shrink and enlarge items has allowed her to pull off a number of very impressive heists. levels: 19-34 powers power 22px resistance auto, tsoo ink men are highly resistant to toxins. ==== blast furnace ==== main article: blast furnace thumb 125px blast furnace is a mutant who can cause his body to burst into flame. somewhat uncontrollable, he has taken to wearing armor to contain his awesome energies. levels: 19-54 powers power 22px fire shield toggle, self while this power is active, you get a good resistance to lethal, smashing and fire damage. fire shield also provides minimal resistance to cold damage. power 22px resistance auto, heroes are resistant to lethal, smashing, energy, fire and cold damage. ==== desdemona ==== main article: desdemona the daughter of the original desdemona, eve salvatore was destined to take up her mother's persona and pursue a life of crime. however, hers is a life of choices, and even the arachnos' fortunatas can't predict her destine accurately. as a demon summoning mastermind she has the power to bend the wills of infernal entities to that of her own, a power that she has used to great effect in ridding the world of anyone who dared stand in her way. powers ==== doc quantum ==== main article: doc quantum doctor quantum has used his scientific genius to develop a means of wielding quantum energies to defeat super-powered menaces. powers ==== flambeaux ==== thumb 100px main article: flambeaux flambeaux is a fiery-haired hero who developed a process to turn her body energies into biochemical fire she can project at her enemies. powers ==== frostfire ==== thumb 100px main article: frostfire leonard calhoun used to imagine life as a hero. his strong elemental powers seemed to be just what the job required. leonard made himself a costume and took up the name frostfire, but he soon found that saving people wasn´t nearly as appealing as picking their pockets. frostfire descended into a life of crime and began to gather together other misguided mutants such as himself. thus, the outcasts were born. levels: 19-34, 29-44, 39-54 powers power 22px resistance auto, , +recovery resistance ==== hollow point ==== right thumb 100px main article: hollow point forgotten by his unit and left for dead behind enemy lines, for hollow point escaping from that hell was only the beginning of the war. one by one he is making those who abandoned him realize the scope of their mistake. powers ==== maelstrom ==== right thumb 100px main article: maelstrom eddie 'maelstrom' polstra received his nickname due to the device on his chest that keeps him alive. his background as a soldier has given maelstrom a strong sense of loyalty, but only to those who are willing to trust him back. what exactly maelstrom is after is a mystery to all but him, though his determination will surely see his goals become a reality one day. powers power 22px cloaking device (only levels 1-39) auto, self stealth, the cloaking device allows you to use an lcd body coating become partially invisible. while cloaked you can only be seen at very close range. if you attack while cloaked, you will be discovered. even if discovered, you are hard to see and have a bonus to defense. unlike some stealth powers, the cloaking device has no movement penalty. power 22px cloaking device (only levels 40 and up) auto, self stealth, the cloaking device allows you to use an lcd body coating become partially invisible. while cloaked you can only be seen at very close range. if you attack while cloaked, you will be discovered. even if discovered, you are hard to see and have a bonus to defense. unlike some stealth powers, the cloaking device has no movement penalty. ==== mangle ==== right thumb 100px main article: mangle mangle was an unwilling attraction for a travelling freak show, but the chains couldn't contain his fury forever. once free he waited in the shadows to repay his captors' "kindness" with blood. powers ==== miss thystle ==== 100px thumb main article: miss thystle this woman was just born into the wrong family. her parents being her role model, she decided that she wanted it all in life, without the hassle of working for it. miss thystle doesn't care how she gets what she wants, just as long as she gets it. powers power 22px resistance auto res lethal, smash, fire, cold, energy, negative energy, toxic, radiation villains are resistant to lethal, smashing, energy, fire and cold damage. ==== overdrive ==== 100px thumb main polar shift polar shift was orphaned when a tragic avalanche buried her parents' cabin. she barely survived by becoming one with the bone chilling ice, changing her life forever. levels: 19-54 powers channel into magnificient powers. unwilling to tread down a mystical road himself, joachim was determined to find a way to summon this dark matter through technology. eventually, he created his "nano-noir" technology, which allowed small nannites within his body to store the dark matter and release it on demand. of all paragon city's heroes, ravenstorm is the most solitary. many find it surprising that he has formed such a close friendship with moonfire, the kheldian hero stationed on striga isle. but perhaps he considers her, like himself, alone in the world. powers ==== shock corpus: == overview == the rulu-shin are an enemy group in city of heroes and city of villains encountered during the who will die story arc. == background == == enemy types == === minions === ==== rularuu's might ==== thumb 100px rularuu's might those who have shown great physical prowess in the rulu-shin are sent the front lines in the battle for rularuu's power. they are called the might of rularuu, for they enforce rularuu's might where he cannot - for now. levels: 19-34 powers power 22px damage resistance the rulu-shin are naturally resistant to several types of damage. === lieutenants === ==== rularuu's word ==== 100px thumb rularuu's word those who have shown great dedication in the rulu-shin are deemed rularuu's word. their spoken word represents the voice of rularuu in this world while he is unable to speak for himself. levels: 19-34 powers power 22px damage resistance the rulu-shin are naturally resistant to several types of damage. === bosses === ==== rularuu's will ==== thumb 100px rularuu's will the greatest members of the rulu-shin become rularuu's will. it is said every act they take is directed by rularuu himself. levels: 19-34 powers power 22px damage resistance the rulu-shin are naturally resistant to several types of damage. === elite bosses === ==== the zealous one ==== thumb 100px the zealous one there are a few withing the organization of the rulu-shin who are deemed higher than those within the rank of rularuu's will. some say these members talk directly to rularuu within their dreams, though there is no actual proof of these conversations. levels: 19-34 powers power 22px damage resistance the rulu-shin are naturally resistant to several types of damage. === named bosses === * rulu-shin gatherer (found on part ii: believers mission from michael binocolo as part of the signature story arc: who will die, episode 2) == historical == *the first reference to this enemy group was made in issue 12 (may 2008): the rularuu library in the midnighter club includes the book the rulu-shin: the zealot followers of rularuu by darrin wade. *this enemy group was added to the game on october 11, 2011 with the release of who will die? - part 2. == see also == *michael binocolo *vladimir zolner *who will die *soldiers of rularuu category:enemies category:shadow shard lore

enemy_names: The Awakened, a group of ex-Seers.
corpus: == overview == the seers are an ally and enemy group in praetoria. == background == left 200px seers "i don't even see the seers anymore. i just know that i'm safe."--joshua combes, engineer, gravatech labs like lady justice herself, the seers stand vigilant over their city and keep her citizens safe from themselves. they are uncompromising but fair in all their judgments. the seers put a stop to crime before it even happens. the seers are possibly the greatest law enforcement officers ever created. the seer network blankets praetoria city, rooting out criminal thoughts and then reporting them to the praetoria police department. once suspects are apprehended and brought in on charges, they are subjected to a more thorough scanning by seer beholders and ppd interrogators who discover the truth of the situation. thought crime does not carry a harsh punishment, however. those found guilty are merely subjected to resocialization and reeducation regimens that correct the mental imbalances that are the source of such criminal behavior. once rehabilitated, a prisoner's citizenship is reinstated, and he or she is returned to his or her normal life. praetoria's thought criminal prison, the behavioral adjustment facility, is a small, efficient institute that concentrates on correcting the problem, not just the symptoms. unfortunately, the heroic and self-serving seers have short life spans, though their life spans are longer than they would have been without seer training and augmentations. every seer was at one time an unstable and dangerous psychic. careful screening detects these individuals before they can become a danger to the city, and they are given a choice: live out the rest of their short lives in the mother of mercy psychiatric hospital where they will be monitored and cared for, or become seers and use their powers to do good for the city. the majority chooses to help others, and thanks to the seers' noble sacrifices, praetorians live in a world with little fear of crime. :taken from http://web.archive.org/web/20111108223905/http://goingrogue.na.cityofheroes.com/en/game-info/enemy-groups/seers.html seers official enemy group profile == enemy types == === minions === ==== scanner ==== right 100px thumb the seers use their telepatic powers to root out anyone plotting against the status quo in praetoria. although they work in close concert with the ppd, it is well known that they were created by mother mayhem and she ultimately controls their fate. levels: 1-10 powers power 22px resistance auto, + + seers are able to predict their foes' incoming attacks granting them a minor defense buff, and are quite resistant to psychic damage. ==== tracker ==== right 100px thumb trackers are adepts at picking out particular thoughts among the sea of confusion generated by the minds of praetoria. they can be given a subject or word to listen for, pluck it out of the air and lead ppd forces right to the person whose thoughts they are hunting. levels: 11-20 powers power 22px resistance auto, + + seers are able to predict their foes' incoming attacks granting them a minor defense buff, and are quite resistant to psychic damage. ==== scryer ==== right 100px thumb scryers are among the elite of mother mayhem's seers. they make up the rank and file combatants among the elite. they specialize in tearing their foes minds apart with their mental assault while peering into the mind of their foes to find their weakness. levels: 20-54 powers power 22px resistance auto, + + seers are able to predict their foes' incoming attacks granting them a minor defense buff, and are quite resistant to psychic damage. ==== seeker ==== right 100px thumb seekers are among the elite of mother mayhem's seers. they make up the rank and file combatants among the elite. seekers have the ability to mend others' wounds with their minds as well as augment their allies with mental wards. levels: 20-54 powers power 22px resistance auto, + + seers are able to predict their foes' incoming attacks granting them a minor defense buff, and are quite resistant to psychic damage. === lieutenants === ===== viewer ===== right 100px thumb after a scanner has been under mother mayhem's mind for a time one of three things happen. most of them burn out. a smaller percentage shows no indication of greater ability and remains where they are in the ranks. finally the smallest faction demostrates the ability to penetrate more deeply into a subjects mind and is advance to viewer status. levels: 1-10 powers power 22px resistance + + , +res(hold, disorient, sleep) seers are able to predict their foes' incoming attacks granting them a minor defense buff, and are quite resistant to psychic damage. ==== mindshadow ==== right 100px thumb minshadows are the closest thing the seers have to elite field agents. they are combat trained, and their psychic link to t.e.s.t. rangers gives them the ability to summon deadly back up. levels: 11-20 powers power 22px resistance + + , +res(hold, disorient, sleep) seers are able to predict their foes' incoming attacks granting them a minor defense buff, and are quite resistant to psychic damage. ===== diviner ===== 100px right thumb diviners are among the elite of mother mayhem's seers. they are mid-rank combatants among the elite. they specialize in crushing their foes in close range == overview == shadow shard reflections is a faction in city of heroes that inhabits the shadow shard. they were created by uuralur the mirror, who presides over the garden of memories. the beings that reside there are reflections of the worlds that rularuu has consumed, though it is unclear whether he created them out of remorse or amusement. uuralur has organized many of these reflections into a guard force that patrols the area and keeps the remaining reflections in check. reflections do not count toward hunt missions, nor do they count toward badge totals. == villain types == === minions === ==== circle of thorn reflections ==== the reflections seem to be exact copies of the terrors that exist on other worlds. it is unknown whether these mystics are reflections of paragon city's circle of thorns, or of the oranbegans from some other dimension. what is certain is that they fight with the same utter disregard for life that paragon city's heroes have witnessed many a time. ===== air thorn caster ===== powers ===== earth thorn caster ===== powers power 22px rock armor toggle, self while this power is active, the caster's skin becomes stone. rock armor make the cold damage. also, fire attacks deal slightly less damage. ===== thorn wielder ===== powers ==== conscript ==== it's not clear whether these reflections copy the rikti of paragon city, or those of the == overview == the shepherds is a villain group found in the praetorian zone, first ward, from level 20 to 29. == background == == villain types == === minions === ==== cult worshipper ==== 100px right thumb often driven to the shepherds to enact vigilante justice upon the slavers and derelicts of first ward, these formerly harmless citizens are now fanatically loyal cult members. powers power 22px damage resistance the midnight masters are naturally resistant to several types of damage. === lieutenants === ==== doomsayer ==== 100px right thumb the doomsayers believe the utter destruction of their home heralds the beginning of the end of praetoria, but they lead their fellow shepherds in their quest to improve the lot of the first ward citizens. powers :brilliance : power 22px damage resistance the midnight masters are naturally resistant to several types of damage. ==== soothsayer ==== 100px right thumb soothsayers are charismatic leaders of the shepherds. their unwavering belief in the group's purpose as guardians of first ward spurs their followers to great success in the face of adversity. powers power 22px damage resistance the midnight masters are naturally resistant to several types of damage. === bosses === ==== prophet ==== 100px right thumb powerful mystics in their own rights, prophets look forward into the future and try to guide their flock to safety and success in the violent land of first ward. powers power 22px world of pain (only level 28 and up) pbaoe, team +tohit, +dmg, , when this power is activated the user and all nearby team members will
